    {
      "user": {
        "additional_context": "",
        "env_context": {
          "env_state": {
            "operating_system": "macos",
            "current_working_directory": "/Users/sdonthineni/projects/cloudpro/cloudpro-invoice",
            "environment_variables": []
          }
        },
        "content": {
          "ToolUseResults": {
            "tool_use_results": [
              {
                "tool_use_id": "tooluse_9Lo7wZvDQ0NgOcJFZpgu1H",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "Text": "import { type ClientSchema, a, defineData } from '@aws-amplify/backend';\nimport { sendInvoiceEmail } from '../functions/send-invoice-email/resource';\nimport { processReceipt } from '../functions/process-receipt/resource';\nimport { processExpenseEmail } from '../functions/process-expense-email/resource';\n\nconst schema = a.schema({\n  // Company Profile - stores user's business details\n  CompanyProfile: a\n    .model({\n      companyName: a.string().required(),\n      companyEmail: a.string(),\n      companyPhone: a.string(),\n      companyAddress: a.string(),\n      companyCity: a.string(),\n      companyState: a.string(),\n      companyPostalCode: a.string(),\n      companyCountry: a.string().default('New Zealand'),\n      gstNumber: a.string(), // NZ GST number\n      bankAccount: a.string(), // NZ bank account\n      defaultCurrency: a.string().default('NZD'),\n      defaultGstRate: a.float().default(15), // NZ GST is 15%\n      logoUrl: a.string(),\n      // Email preferences\n      emailSubjectTemplate: a.string().default('Invoice {invoiceNumber} from {companyName}'),\n      emailBodyTemplate: a.string().default('Please find attached invoice {invoiceNumber} for {total}. Payment is due by {dueDate}. Thank you for your business.'),\n      emailReplyTo: a.string(),\n      emailCcSelf: a.boolean().default(true),\n      defaultTemplate: a.string().default('modern'),\n      // Reminder settings\n      reminderEnabled: a.boolean().default(false),\n      reminderDaysBefore: a.string().default('7,3,1'),\n      reminderDaysAfter: a.string().default('1,7,14'),\n      reminderSubjectTemplate: a.string().default('Reminder: Invoice {invoiceNumber} from {companyName}'),\n      reminderBodyTemplate: a.string().default('This is a friendly reminder that invoice {invoiceNumber} for {total} is due on {dueDate}. Please arrange payment at your earliest convenience.'),\n      userId: a.string().required(),\n      user: a.belongsTo('User', 'userId'),\n    })\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.owner()),\n\n  User: a\n    .model({\n      email: a.string().required(),\n      firstName: a.string(),\n      lastName: a.string(),\n      companyProfile: a.hasOne('CompanyProfile', 'userId'),\n      invoices: a.hasMany('Invoice', 'userId'),\n      clients: a.hasMany('Client', 'userId'),\n      expenses: a.hasMany('Expense', 'userId'),\n    })\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.owner()),\n\n  Client: a\n    .model({\n      name: a.string().required(),\n      email: a.string(),\n      phone: a.string(),\n      address: a.string(),\n      city: a.string(),\n      state: a.string(),\n      postalCode: a.string(),\n      country: a.string().default('New Zealand'),\n      notes: a.string(),\n      userId: a.string().required(),\n      user: a.belongsTo('User', 'userId'),\n      invoices: a.hasMany('Invoice', 'clientId'),\n    })\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.owner()),\n\n  Invoice: a\n    .model({\n      invoiceNumber: a.string().required(),\n      clientName: a.string().required(),\n      clientEmail: a.string(),\n      clientAddress: a.string(),\n      issueDate: a.datetime().required(),\n      dueDate: a.datetime(),\n      items: a.hasMany('InvoiceItem', 'invoiceId'),\n      notes: a.string(),\n      paymentTerms: a.string().default('Due by 20th of the month'),\n      subtotal: a.float().required(),\n      gstRate: a.float().default(15), // NZ GST rate\n      gstAmount: a.float(),\n      total: a.float().required(),\n      currency: a.string().default('NZD'),\n      status: a.enum(['DRAFT', 'SENT', 'PAID', 'OVERDUE', 'CANCELLED']),\n      pdfUrl: a.string(),\n      portalToken: a.string(),\n      lastReminderSent: a.datetime(),\n      reminderCount: a.integer().default(0),\n      // Company details at time of invoice (snapshot)\n      companyName: a.string(),\n      companyEmail: a.string(),\n      companyPhone: a.string(),\n      companyAddress: a.string(),\n      gstNumber: a.string(),\n      bankAccount: a.string(),\n      userId: a.string().required(),\n      user: a.belongsTo('User', 'userId'),\n      clientId: a.string(),\n      client: a.belongsTo('Client', 'clientId'),\n    })\n    .authorization((allow) => [allow.owner(), allow.publicApiKey().to(['read'])]),\n\n  InvoiceItem: a\n    .model({\n      description: a.string().required(),\n      wbs: a.string(), // Work Breakdown Structure / Project code\n      quantity: a.float().required(),\n      unitPrice: a.float().required(),\n      amount: a.float().required(),\n      invoiceId: a.string().required(),\n      invoice: a.belongsTo('Invoice', 'invoiceId'),\n    })\n    .authorization((allow) => [allow.owner(), allow.publicApiKey().to(['read'])]),\n\n  Expense: a\n    .model({\n      description: a.string().required(),\n      category: a.string(),\n      amount: a.float().required(),\n      amountExGst: a.float(), // Amount excluding GST\n      gstAmount: a.float(), // GST component\n      gstClaimable: a.boolean().default(true), // Can claim GST back\n      date: a.datetime().required(),\n      receiptUrl: a.string(),\n      notes: a.string(),\n      status: a.enum(['PENDING', 'APPROVED', 'REJECTED']),\n      // Email ingest fields\n      source: a.enum(['manual', 'email']),\n      sourceConfidence: a.enum(['high', 'low']),\n      userId: a.string().required(),\n      user: a.belongsTo('User', 'userId'),\n    })\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.owner()),\n\n  // Stores each company's unique ingest email key\n  ExpenseIngestConfig: a\n    .model({\n      ingestKey: a.string().required(), // unique key for email address\n      ingestEmail: a.string().required(), // full email address for display\n      active: a.boolean().default(true),\n      userId: a.string().required(),\n      user: a.belongsTo('User', 'userId'),\n    })\n    .secondaryIndexes((index) => [index('ingestKey')])\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.owner()),\n\n  RecurringInvoice: a\n    .model({\n      clientId: a.string().required(),\n      clientName: a.string().required(),\n      clientEmail: a.string(),\n      frequency: a.enum(['WEEKLY', 'FORTNIGHTLY', 'MONTHLY', 'QUARTERLY', 'ANNUALLY']),\n      nextDate: a.date().required(),\n      endDate: a.date(),\n      active: a.boolean().default(true),\n      lineItems: a.json(), // JSON array of {description, wbs, quantity, unitPrice, amount}\n      notes: a.string(),\n      paymentTerms: a.string().default('Due by 20th of the month'),\n      currency: a.string().default('NZD'),\n      generatedCount: a.integer().default(0),\n      lastGeneratedDate: a.date(),\n      userId: a.string().required(),\n    })\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.owner()),\n\n  // Custom mutation for sending invoice emails\n  sendInvoiceEmail: a\n    .mutation()\n    .arguments({\n      to: a.string().required(),\n      cc: a.string(),\n      replyTo: a.string(),\n      subject: a.string().required(),\n      body: a.string().required(),\n      pdfBase64: a.string().required(),\n      fileName: a.string().required(),\n      fromName: a.string(),\n    })\n    .returns(a.json())\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.authenticated())\n    .handler(a.handler.function(sendInvoiceEmail)),\n\n  processReceipt: a\n    .mutation()\n    .arguments({\n      imageBase64: a.string().required(),\n    })\n    .returns(a.json())\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.authenticated())\n    .handler(a.handler.function(processReceipt)),\n});\n\nexport type Schema = ClientSchema<typeof schema>;\n\nexport const data = defineData({\n  schema,\n  authorizationModes: {\n    defaultAuthorizationMode: 'userPool',\n    apiKeyAuthorizationMode: {\n      expiresInDays: 365,\n    },\n  },\n});"
                  }
                ],
                "status": "Success"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        "timestamp": null,
        "images": null
      },
      "assistant": {
        "ToolUse": {
          "message_id": "75460bad-1693-4a23-9073-7525acf4b0bb",
          "content": "Good, I can see the full schema. Now let me add the whitelist model and update the Lambda handler, then create the settings page.",
          "tool_uses": [
            {
              "id": "tooluse_yYMJu7Vqmg961TZ366Qe8w",
              "name": "fs_write",
              "orig_name": "fs_write",
              "args": {
                "command": "str_replace",
                "new_str": "  // Stores each company's unique ingest email key\n  ExpenseIngestConfig: a\n    .model({\n      ingestKey: a.string().required(), // unique key for email address\n      ingestEmail: a.string().required(), // full email address for display\n      active: a.boolean().default(true),\n      whitelistedEmails: a.string().array(), // only process emails from these senders\n      userId: a.string().required(),\n      user: a.belongsTo('User', 'userId'),\n    })\n    .secondaryIndexes((index) => [index('ingestKey')])\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.owner()),",
                "old_str": "  // Stores each company's unique ingest email key\n  ExpenseIngestConfig: a\n    .model({\n      ingestKey: a.string().required(), // unique key for email address\n      ingestEmail: a.string().required(), // full email address for display\n      active: a.boolean().default(true),\n      userId: a.string().required(),\n      user: a.belongsTo('User', 'userId'),\n    })\n    .secondaryIndexes((index) => [index('ingestKey')])\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.owner()),",
                "path": "/Users/sdonthineni/projects/cloudpro/cloudpro-invoice/amplify/data/resource.ts",
                "summary": "Add whitelistedEmails array to ExpenseIngestConfig model"
              },
              "orig_args": {
                "command": "str_replace",
                "new_str": "  // Stores each company's unique ingest email key\n  ExpenseIngestConfig: a\n    .model({\n      ingestKey: a.string().required(), // unique key for email address\n      ingestEmail: a.string().required(), // full email address for display\n      active: a.boolean().default(true),\n      whitelistedEmails: a.string().array(), // only process emails from these senders\n      userId: a.string().required(),\n      user: a.belongsTo('User', 'userId'),\n    })\n    .secondaryIndexes((index) => [index('ingestKey')])\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.owner()),",
                "old_str": "  // Stores each company's unique ingest email key\n  ExpenseIngestConfig: a\n    .model({\n      ingestKey: a.string().required(), // unique key for email address\n      ingestEmail: a.string().required(), // full email address for display\n      active: a.boolean().default(true),\n      userId: a.string().required(),\n      user: a.belongsTo('User', 'userId'),\n    })\n    .secondaryIndexes((index) => [index('ingestKey')])\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.owner()),",

      "user": {

        "content": {

      },
      "assistant": {
        "ToolUse": {
          "message_id": "dcbbd3d4-ae94-45d6-b698-4c8f771bb562",
          "content": "Now update the Lambda handler to enforce the whitelist:",
          "tool_uses": [
            {
              "id": "tooluse_iy3gRP4J40XlQ04Jr8LmLv",
              "name": "fs_write",
              "orig_name": "fs_write",
              "args": {
                "command": "create",
                "file_text": "/**\n * Process Expense Email Lambda\n *\n * Triggered by SES inbound email → S3 → this Lambda.\n * Flow: Parse email → check sender whitelist → extract attachments\n *       → Textract (PDF) or Bedrock Vision (images)\n *       → Bedrock Haiku (interpret & structure) → create draft Expense in DynamoDB.\n */\nimport { S3Client, GetObjectCommand } from '@aws-sdk/client-s3';\nimport { TextractClient, AnalyzeExpenseCommand } from '@aws-sdk/client-textract';\nimport { BedrockRuntimeClient, InvokeModelCommand } from '@aws-sdk/client-bedrock-runtime';\nimport { DynamoDBClient } from '@aws-sdk/client-dynamodb';\nimport { DynamoDBDocumentClient, PutCommand, QueryCommand } from '@aws-sdk/lib-dynamodb';\nimport { simpleParser, ParsedMail, Attachment } from 'mailparser';\n\nconst s3 = new S3Client({});\nconst textract = new TextractClient({});\nconst bedrock = new BedrockRuntimeClient({});\nconst ddb = DynamoDBDocumentClient.from(new DynamoDBClient({}));\n\nconst EXPENSE_TABLE = process.env.EXPENSE_TABLE_NAME!;\nconst INGEST_CONFIG_TABLE = process.env.INGEST_CONFIG_TABLE_NAME!;\nconst BEDROCK_MODEL = process.env.BEDROCK_MODEL_ID!;\n\ninterface ExtractedExpense {\n  vendor: string;\n  description: string;\n  total: string;\n  tax: string;\n  date: string;\n  category: string;\n  confidence: 'high' | 'low';\n}\n\ninterface IngestConfig {\n  owner: string;\n  userId: string;\n  active: boolean;\n  whitelistedEmails?: string[];\n}\n\ninterface SESEvent {\n  Records: Array<{\n    ses: {\n      mail: {\n        messageId: string;\n        destination: string[];\n        source: string;\n      };\n    };\n  }>;\n}\n\nexport const handler = async (event: SESEvent) => {\n  const record = event.Records[0];\n  const { messageId, destination, source: senderEmail } = record.ses.mail;\n  const recipientEmail = destination[0]?.toLowerCase();\n\n  // Extract ingest key from recipient email\n  const ingestKey = extractIngestKey(recipientEmail);\n  if (!ingestKey) {\n    console.error('Could not extract ingest key from:', recipientEmail);\n    return { status: 'ignored', reason: 'no_ingest_key' };\n  }\n\n  // Look up config for this ingest key\n  const config = await lookupIngestConfig(ingestKey);\n  if (!config) {\n    console.error('No ingest config found for key:', ingestKey);\n    return { status: 'ignored', reason: 'unknown_key' };\n  }\n\n  if (!config.active) {\n    console.log('Ingest disabled for key:', ingestKey);\n    return { status: 'ignored', reason: 'inactive' };\n  }\n\n  // === WHITELIST CHECK ===\n  const sender = senderEmail.toLowerCase().trim();\n  if (!isSenderWhitelisted(sender, config.whitelistedEmails)) {\n    console.warn(`Sender ${sender} not whitelisted for ingest key ${ingestKey}. Ignoring.`);\n    return { status: 'rejected', reason: 'sender_not_whitelisted', sender };\n  }\n\n  // Fetch raw email from S3\n  const bucket = process.env.SES_BUCKET_NAME!;\n  const key = `inbound-emails/${messageId}`;\n  const raw = await s3.send(new GetObjectCommand({ Bucket: bucket, Key: key }));\n  const emailBuffer = Buffer.from(await raw.Body!.transformToByteArray());\n\n  const parsed: ParsedMail = await simpleParser(emailBuffer);\n  const results: ExtractedExpense[] = [];\n\n  // Process attachments\n  for (const att of parsed.attachments || []) {\n    if (isPdf(att)) {\n      const extracted = await processPdfWithTextractAndAI(att.content);\n      if (extracted) results.push(extracted);\n    } else if (isImage(att)) {\n      const extracted = await processImageWithVision(att.content);\n      if (extracted) results.push(extracted);\n    }\n  }\n\n  // If no attachments, try email body\n  if (results.length === 0 && parsed.text) {\n    const extracted = await extractFromEmailBody(parsed.text, sender);\n    if (extracted) results.push(extracted);\n  }\n\n  // Create draft expenses\n  for (const expense of results) {\n    await createDraftExpense(expense, config.owner, config.userId, sender);\n  }\n\n  console.log(`Processed ${results.length} expenses from ${sender} for key ${ingestKey}`);\n  return { status: 'processed', expenses: results.length };\n};\n\n/**\n * Check if sender is in the whitelist.\n * Supports exact email match and wildcard domain match (*@domain.com).\n * Empty/undefined whitelist = reject all (secure by default).\n */\nfunction isSenderWhitelisted(sender: string, whitelist?: string[]): boolean {\n  if (!whitelist || whitelist.length === 0) return false;\n\n  return whitelist.some((entry) => {\n    const rule = entry.toLowerCase().trim();\n    if (rule.startsWith('*@')) {\n      // Domain wildcard: *@spark.co.nz matches anything@spark.co.nz\n      const domain = rule.substring(2);\n      return sender.endsWith(`@${domain}`);\n    }\n    return sender === rule;\n  });\n}\n\nfunction extractIngestKey(email: string): string | null {\n  const plusMatch = email.match(/^expenses\\+([a-z0-9]+)@/);\n  if (plusMatch) return plusMatch[1];\n  const subdomainMatch = email.match(/^([a-z0-9]+)@expenses\\./);\n  if (subdomainMatch) return subdomainMatch[1];\n  return null;\n}\n\nasync function lookupIngestConfig(ingestKey: string): Promise<IngestConfig | undefined> {\n  const result = await ddb.send(new QueryCommand({\n    TableName: INGEST_CONFIG_TABLE,\n    IndexName: 'byIngestKey',\n    KeyConditionExpression: 'ingestKey = :key',\n    ExpressionAttributeValues: { ':key': ingestKey },\n    Limit: 1,\n  }));\n  return result.Items?.[0] as IngestConfig | undefined;\n}\n\nfunction isPdf(att: Attachment): boolean {\n  return att.contentType === 'application/pdf' || att.filename?.toLowerCase().endsWith('.pdf') || false;\n}\n\nfunction isImage(att: Attachment): boolean {\n  return att.contentType?.startsWith('image/') || false;\n}\n\nasync function processPdfWithTextractAndAI(pdfBytes: Buffer): Promise<ExtractedExpense | null> {\n  const textractResult = await textract.send(new AnalyzeExpenseCommand({\n    Document: { Bytes: pdfBytes },\n  }));\n\n  const fields: Array<{ type: string; value: string; confidence: number }> = [];\n  for (const doc of textractResult.ExpenseDocuments || []) {\n    for (const field of doc.SummaryFields || []) {\n      fields.push({\n        type: field.Type?.Text || '',\n        value: field.ValueDetection?.Text || '',\n        confidence: field.ValueDetection?.Confidence || 0,\n      });\n    }\n  }\n\n  return await interpretWithAI(JSON.stringify(fields));\n}\n\nasync function processImageWithVision(imageBytes: Buffer): Promise<ExtractedExpense | null> {\n  const base64 = imageBytes.toString('base64');\n\n  const response = await bedrock.send(new InvokeModelCommand({\n    modelId: BEDROCK_MODEL,\n    contentType: 'application/json',\n    body: JSON.stringify({\n      anthropic_version: 'bedrock-2023-05-31',\n      max_tokens: 1024,\n      messages: [{\n        role: 'user',\n        content: [\n          { type: 'image', source: { type: 'base64', media_type: 'image/jpeg', data: base64 } },\n          { type: 'text', text: EXTRACTION_PROMPT },\n        ],\n      }],\n    }),\n  }));\n\n  return parseAIResponse(Buffer.from(response.body).toString());\n}\n\nasync function extractFromEmailBody(bodyText: string, senderEmail: string): Promise<ExtractedExpense | null> {\n  const prompt = `${EXTRACTION_PROMPT}\\n\\nSender: ${senderEmail}\\n\\nEmail body:\\n${bodyText.substring(0, 4000)}`;\n  return await interpretWithAI(prompt);\n}\n\nasync function interpretWithAI(ocrOrText: string): Promise<ExtractedExpense | null> {\n  const response = await bedrock.send(new InvokeModelCommand({\n    modelId: BEDROCK_MODEL,\n    contentType: 'application/json',\n    body: JSON.stringify({\n      anthropic_version: 'bedrock-2023-05-31',\n      max_tokens: 1024,\n      messages: [{\n        role: 'user',\n        content: `${EXTRACTION_PROMPT}\\n\\nOCR/Source data:\\n${ocrOrText.substring(0, 8000)}`,\n      }],\n    }),\n  }));\n\n  return parseAIResponse(Buffer.from(response.body).toString());\n}\n\nconst EXTRACTION_PROMPT = `You are extracting expense data from an invoice, receipt, or bill.\nThe OCR may contain errors. Use context clues to correct obvious mistakes.\n\nReturn ONLY valid JSON (no markdown, no explanation):\n{\n  \"vendor\": \"company name\",\n  \"description\": \"brief description of what this expense is for\",\n  \"total\": \"123.45\",\n  \"tax\": \"15.00\",\n  \"date\": \"2026-01-15\",\n  \"category\": \"one of: Advertising & Marketing, Communication (Phone & Internet), Depreciation, Entertainment (50% deductible), General & Administrative, Insurance, Interest & Bank Fees, Legal & Accounting, Motor Vehicle, Office Expenses, Rent & Rates, Repairs & Maintenance, Software & Subscriptions, Subcontractors, Travel & Accommodation, Other\",\n  \"confidence\": \"high or low\"\n}\n\nIf a field cannot be determined, use empty string. Date format must be YYYY-MM-DD.\nTotal should be the final amount including tax. Tax should be the GST/tax component only.`;\n\nfunction parseAIResponse(responseBody: string): ExtractedExpense | null {\n  try {\n    const parsed = JSON.parse(responseBody);\n    const text = parsed.content?.[0]?.text || '';\n    const jsonMatch = text.match(/\\{[\\s\\S]*\\}/);\n    if (!jsonMatch) return null;\n    return JSON.parse(jsonMatch[0]) as ExtractedExpense;\n  } catch {\n    console.error('Failed to parse AI response');\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\nasync function createDraftExpense(expense: ExtractedExpense, owner: string, userId: string, senderEmail: string) {\n  const total = parseFloat(expense.total) || 0;\n  const tax = parseFloat(expense.tax) || 0;\n  const now = new Date().toISOString();\n  const id = `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 8)}`;\n\n  await ddb.send(new PutCommand({\n    TableName: EXPENSE_TABLE,\n    Item: {\n      id,\n      __typename: 'Expense',\n      description: expense.vendor ? `${expense.vendor} - ${expense.description}` : expense.description,\n      category: expense.category || 'Other',\n      amount: total,\n      amountExGst: total - tax,\n      gstAmount: tax,\n      gstClaimable: true,\n      date: expense.date ? new Date(expense.date).toISOString() : now,\n      notes: `Auto-created from email (${senderEmail}). Confidence: ${expense.confidence}`,\n      status: 'PENDING',\n      source: 'email',\n      sourceConfidence: expense.confidence,\n      userId,\n      owner,\n      createdAt: now,\n      updatedAt: now,\n    },\n  }));\n}\n",
                "path": "/Users/sdonthineni/projects/cloudpro/cloudpro-invoice/amplify/functions/process-expense-email/handler.ts",
                "summary": "Update Lambda handler with sender whitelist enforcement - rejects non-whitelisted senders before any processing"
              },
              "orig_args": {
                "command": "create",
                "file_text": "/**\n * Process Expense Email Lambda\n *\n * Triggered by SES inbound email → S3 → this Lambda.\n * Flow: Parse email → check sender whitelist → extract attachments\n *       → Textract (PDF) or Bedrock Vision (images)\n *       → Bedrock Haiku (interpret & structure) → create draft Expense in DynamoDB.\n */\nimport { S3Client, GetObjectCommand } from '@aws-sdk/client-s3';\nimport { TextractClient, AnalyzeExpenseCommand } from '@aws-sdk/client-textract';\nimport { BedrockRuntimeClient, InvokeModelCommand } from '@aws-sdk/client-bedrock-runtime';\nimport { DynamoDBClient } from '@aws-sdk/client-dynamodb';\nimport { DynamoDBDocumentClient, PutCommand, QueryCommand } from '@aws-sdk/lib-dynamodb';\nimport { simpleParser, ParsedMail, Attachment } from 'mailparser';\n\nconst s3 = new S3Client({});\nconst textract = new TextractClient({});\nconst bedrock = new BedrockRuntimeClient({});\nconst ddb = DynamoDBDocumentClient.from(new DynamoDBClient({}));\n\nconst EXPENSE_TABLE = process.env.EXPENSE_TABLE_NAME!;\nconst INGEST_CONFIG_TABLE = process.env.INGEST_CONFIG_TABLE_NAME!;\nconst BEDROCK_MODEL = process.env.BEDROCK_MODEL_ID!;\n\ninterface ExtractedExpense {\n  vendor: string;\n  description: string;\n  total: string;\n  tax: string;\n  date: string;\n  category: string;\n  confidence: 'high' | 'low';\n}\n\ninterface IngestConfig {\n  owner: string;\n  userId: string;\n  active: boolean;\n  whitelistedEmails?: string[];\n}\n\ninterface SESEvent {\n  Records: Array<{\n    ses: {\n      mail: {\n        messageId: string;\n        destination: string[];\n        source: string;\n      };\n    };\n  }>;\n}\n\nexport const handler = async (event: SESEvent) => {\n  const record = event.Records[0];\n  const { messageId, destination, source: senderEmail } = record.ses.mail;\n  const recipientEmail = destination[0]?.toLowerCase();\n\n  // Extract ingest key from recipient email\n  const ingestKey = extractIngestKey(recipientEmail);\n  if (!ingestKey) {\n    console.error('Could not extract ingest key from:', recipientEmail);\n    return { status: 'ignored', reason: 'no_ingest_key' };\n  }\n\n  // Look up config for this ingest key\n  const config = await lookupIngestConfig(ingestKey);\n  if (!config) {\n    console.error('No ingest config found for key:', ingestKey);\n    return { status: 'ignored', reason: 'unknown_key' };\n  }\n\n  if (!config.active) {\n    console.log('Ingest disabled for key:', ingestKey);\n    return { status: 'ignored', reason: 'inactive' };\n  }\n\n  // === WHITELIST CHECK ===\n  const sender = senderEmail.toLowerCase().trim();\n  if (!isSenderWhitelisted(sender, config.whitelistedEmails)) {\n    console.warn(`Sender ${sender} not whitelisted for ingest key ${ingestKey}. Ignoring.`);\n    return { status: 'rejected', reason: 'sender_not_whitelisted', sender };\n  }\n\n  // Fetch raw email from S3\n  const bucket = process.env.SES_BUCKET_NAME!;\n  const key = `inbound-emails/${messageId}`;\n  const raw = await s3.send(new GetObjectCommand({ Bucket: bucket, Key: key }));\n  const emailBuffer = Buffer.from(await raw.Body!.transformToByteArray());\n\n  const parsed: ParsedMail = await simpleParser(emailBuffer);\n  const results: ExtractedExpense[] = [];\n\n  // Process attachments\n  for (const att of parsed.attachments || []) {\n    if (isPdf(att)) {\n      const extracted = await processPdfWithTextractAndAI(att.content);\n      if (extracted) results.push(extracted);\n    } else if (isImage(att)) {\n      const extracted = await processImageWithVision(att.content);\n      if (extracted) results.push(extracted);\n    }\n  }\n\n  // If no attachments, try email body\n  if (results.length === 0 && parsed.text) {\n    const extracted = await extractFromEmailBody(parsed.text, sender);\n    if (extracted) results.push(extracted);\n  }\n\n  // Create draft expenses\n  for (const expense of results) {\n    await createDraftExpense(expense, config.owner, config.userId, sender);\n  }\n\n  console.log(`Processed ${results.length} expenses from ${sender} for key ${ingestKey}`);\n  return { status: 'processed', expenses: results.length };\n};\n\n/**\n * Check if sender is in the whitelist.\n * Supports exact email match and wildcard domain match (*@domain.com).\n * Empty/undefined whitelist = reject all (secure by default).\n */\nfunction isSenderWhitelisted(sender: string, whitelist?: string[]): boolean {\n  if (!whitelist || whitelist.length === 0) return false;\n\n  return whitelist.some((entry) => {\n    const rule = entry.toLowerCase().trim();\n    if (rule.startsWith('*@')) {\n      // Domain wildcard: *@spark.co.nz matches anything@spark.co.nz\n      const domain = rule.substring(2);\n      return sender.endsWith(`@${domain}`);\n    }\n    return sender === rule;\n  });\n}\n\nfunction extractIngestKey(email: string): string | null {\n  const plusMatch = email.match(/^expenses\\+([a-z0-9]+)@/);\n  if (plusMatch) return plusMatch[1];\n  const subdomainMatch = email.match(/^([a-z0-9]+)@expenses\\./);\n  if (subdomainMatch) return subdomainMatch[1];\n  return null;\n}\n\nasync function lookupIngestConfig(ingestKey: string): Promise<IngestConfig | undefined> {\n  const result = await ddb.send(new QueryCommand({\n    TableName: INGEST_CONFIG_TABLE,\n    IndexName: 'byIngestKey',\n    KeyConditionExpression: 'ingestKey = :key',\n    ExpressionAttributeValues: { ':key': ingestKey },\n    Limit: 1,\n  }));\n  return result.Items?.[0] as IngestConfig | undefined;\n}\n\nfunction isPdf(att: Attachment): boolean {\n  return att.contentType === 'application/pdf' || att.filename?.toLowerCase().endsWith('.pdf') || false;\n}\n\nfunction isImage(att: Attachment): boolean {\n  return att.contentType?.startsWith('image/') || false;\n}\n\nasync function processPdfWithTextractAndAI(pdfBytes: Buffer): Promise<ExtractedExpense | null> {\n  const textractResult = await textract.send(new AnalyzeExpenseCommand({\n    Document: { Bytes: pdfBytes },\n  }));\n\n  const fields: Array<{ type: string; value: string; confidence: number }> = [];\n  for (const doc of textractResult.ExpenseDocuments || []) {\n    for (const field of doc.SummaryFields || []) {\n      fields.push({\n        type: field.Type?.Text || '',\n        value: field.ValueDetection?.Text || '',\n        confidence: field.ValueDetection?.Confidence || 0,\n      });\n    }\n  }\n\n  return await interpretWithAI(JSON.stringify(fields));\n}\n\nasync function processImageWithVision(imageBytes: Buffer): Promise<ExtractedExpense | null> {\n  const base64 = imageBytes.toString('base64');\n\n  const response = await bedrock.send(new InvokeModelCommand({\n    modelId: BEDROCK_MODEL,\n    contentType: 'application/json',\n    body: JSON.stringify({\n      anthropic_version: 'bedrock-2023-05-31',\n      max_tokens: 1024,\n      messages: [{\n        role: 'user',\n        content: [\n          { type: 'image', source: { type: 'base64', media_type: 'image/jpeg', data: base64 } },\n          { type: 'text', text: EXTRACTION_PROMPT },\n        ],\n      }],\n    }),\n  }));\n\n  return parseAIResponse(Buffer.from(response.body).toString());\n}\n\nasync function extractFromEmailBody(bodyText: string, senderEmail: string): Promise<ExtractedExpense | null> {\n  const prompt = `${EXTRACTION_PROMPT}\\n\\nSender: ${senderEmail}\\n\\nEmail body:\\n${bodyText.substring(0, 4000)}`;\n  return await interpretWithAI(prompt);\n}\n\nasync function interpretWithAI(ocrOrText: string): Promise<ExtractedExpense | null> {\n  const response = await bedrock.send(new InvokeModelCommand({\n    modelId: BEDROCK_MODEL,\n    contentType: 'application/json',\n    body: JSON.stringify({\n      anthropic_version: 'bedrock-2023-05-31',\n      max_tokens: 1024,\n      messages: [{\n        role: 'user',\n        content: `${EXTRACTION_PROMPT}\\n\\nOCR/Source data:\\n${ocrOrText.substring(0, 8000)}`,\n      }],\n    }),\n  }));\n\n  return parseAIResponse(Buffer.from(response.body).toString());\n}\n\nconst EXTRACTION_PROMPT = `You are extracting expense data from an invoice, receipt, or bill.\nThe OCR may contain errors. Use context clues to correct obvious mistakes.\n\nReturn ONLY valid JSON (no markdown, no explanation):\n{\n  \"vendor\": \"company name\",\n  \"description\": \"brief description of what this expense is for\",\n  \"total\": \"123.45\",\n  \"tax\": \"15.00\",\n  \"date\": \"2026-01-15\",\n  \"category\": \"one of: Advertising & Marketing, Communication (Phone & Internet), Depreciation, Entertainment (50% deductible), General & Administrative, Insurance, Interest & Bank Fees, Legal & Accounting, Motor Vehicle, Office Expenses, Rent & Rates, Repairs & Maintenance, Software & Subscriptions, Subcontractors, Travel & Accommodation, Other\",\n  \"confidence\": \"high or low\"\n}\n\nIf a field cannot be determined, use empty string. Date format must be YYYY-MM-DD.\nTotal should be the final amount including tax. Tax should be the GST/tax component only.`;\n\nfunction parseAIResponse(responseBody: string): ExtractedExpense | null {\n  try {\n    const parsed = JSON.parse(responseBody);\n    const text = parsed.content?.[0]?.text || '';\n    const jsonMatch = text.match(/\\{[\\s\\S]*\\}/);\n    if (!jsonMatch) return null;\n    return JSON.parse(jsonMatch[0]) as ExtractedExpense;\n  } catch {\n    console.error('Failed to parse AI response');\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\nasync function createDraftExpense(expense: ExtractedExpense, owner: string, userId: string, senderEmail: string) {\n  const total = parseFloat(expense.total) || 0;\n  const tax = parseFloat(expense.tax) || 0;\n  const now = new Date().toISOString();\n  const id = `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 8)}`;\n\n  await ddb.send(new PutCommand({\n    TableName: EXPENSE_TABLE,\n    Item: {\n      id,\n      __typename: 'Expense',\n      description: expense.vendor ? `${expense.vendor} - ${expense.description}` : expense.description,\n      category: expense.category || 'Other',\n      amount: total,\n      amountExGst: total - tax,\n      gstAmount: tax,\n      gstClaimable: true,\n      date: expense.date ? new Date(expense.date).toISOString() : now,\n      notes: `Auto-created from email (${senderEmail}). Confidence: ${expense.confidence}`,\n      status: 'PENDING',\n      source: 'email',\n      sourceConfidence: expense.confidence,\n      userId,\n      owner,\n      createdAt: now,\n      updatedAt: now,\n    },\n  }));\n}\n",

          "CancelledToolUses": {
            "prompt": "expense date should be the date on the reciept and if the date is not in there that could be left blank or can take todays date",
            "tool_use_results": [
              {
                "tool_use_id": "tooluse_ctYu8228aB3eAmo8CEdvj7",

      "assistant": {
        "ToolUse": {
          "message_id": "ba34f694-0abc-4826-9145-22c538045784",
          "content": "\n\nGood catch. Let me update the Lambda handler — right now it falls back to `now` if no date is found. Let me make it leave the date blank when Textract/AI can't find one, and let the user fill it in during review.",
          "tool_uses": [
            {
              "id": "tooluse_eCbEb8GD6OB2tPPeKQP442",
              "name": "fs_write",
              "orig_name": "fs_write",
              "args": {
                "command": "str_replace",
                "new_str": "      date: expense.date || '',\n      notes: `Auto-created from email (${senderEmail}). Confidence: ${expense.confidence}${!expense.date ? '. Date not found on receipt — please review.' : ''}`,",
                "old_str": "      date: expense.date ? new Date(expense.date).toISOString() : now,\n      notes: `Auto-created from email (${senderEmail}). Confidence: ${expense.confidence}`,",
                "path": "/Users/sdonthineni/projects/cloudpro/cloudpro-invoice/amplify/functions/process-expense-email/handler.ts",
                "summary": "Leave date blank if not found on receipt instead of defaulting to today, add note for user to review"
              },
              "orig_args": {
                "command": "str_replace",
                "new_str": "      date: expense.date || '',\n      notes: `Auto-created from email (${senderEmail}). Confidence: ${expense.confidence}${!expense.date ? '. Date not found on receipt — please review.' : ''}`,",
                "old_str": "      date: expense.date ? new Date(expense.date).toISOString() : now,\n      notes: `Auto-created from email (${senderEmail}). Confidence: ${expense.confidence}`,",
                "path": "/Users/sdonthineni/projects/cloudpro/cloudpro-invoice/amplify/functions/process-expense-email/handler.ts",
                "summary": "Leave date blank if not found on receipt instead of defaulting to today, add note for user to review"
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      },

      "assistant": {
        "ToolUse": {
          "message_id": "0bb36943-3509-4d63-b78e-d0d1b1a0962d",
          "content": "But wait — the `Expense` model has `date: a.datetime().required()`. A blank date will fail the DynamoDB write since it's required. We need to make it optional for email-ingested expenses.",
          "tool_uses": [
            {
              "id": "tooluse_nR7XKnKLL8C11NW4zgDkkG",
              "name": "fs_write",
              "orig_name": "fs_write",
              "args": {
                "command": "str_replace",
                "new_str": "      date: a.datetime(),",
                "old_str": "      date: a.datetime().required(),",
                "path": "/Users/sdonthineni/projects/cloudpro/cloudpro-invoice/amplify/data/resource.ts",
                "summary": "Make Expense date optional so email-ingested expenses without a receipt date can be saved as drafts"
              },
              "orig_args": {
                "command": "str_replace",
                "new_str": "      date: a.datetime(),",
                "old_str": "      date: a.datetime().required(),",

                "summary": "Make Expense date optional so email-ingested expenses without a receipt date can be saved as drafts"
              }
            }
          ]
        }

      "assistant": {
        "ToolUse": {
          "message_id": "ef019d08-c839-4a06-b8ef-74631935665e",
          "content": "Now let me also update the AI prompt to be explicit about this — tell it to leave date empty rather than guess:",
          "tool_uses": [
            {
              "id": "tooluse_aDmdYNhMbb6mXLLMpU0KHl",
              "name": "fs_write",
              "orig_name": "fs_write",
              "args": {
                "command": "str_replace",
                "new_str": "const EXTRACTION_PROMPT = `You are extracting expense data from an invoice, receipt, or bill.\nThe OCR may contain errors. Use context clues to correct obvious mistakes.\n\nReturn ONLY valid JSON (no markdown, no explanation):\n{\n  \"vendor\": \"company name\",\n  \"description\": \"brief description of what this expense is for\",\n  \"total\": \"123.45\",\n  \"tax\": \"15.00\",\n  \"date\": \"2026-01-15\",\n  \"category\": \"one of: Advertising & Marketing, Communication (Phone & Internet), Depreciation, Entertainment (50% deductible), General & Administrative, Insurance, Interest & Bank Fees, Legal & Accounting, Motor Vehicle, Office Expenses, Rent & Rates, Repairs & Maintenance, Software & Subscriptions, Subcontractors, Travel & Accommodation, Other\",\n  \"confidence\": \"high or low\"\n}\n\nIMPORTANT: The date must come from the receipt/invoice itself (invoice date, receipt date, transaction date).\nDo NOT guess or infer a date. If no date is clearly visible on the document, return an empty string for date.\nDate format must be YYYY-MM-DD. Total should be the final amount including tax. Tax is the GST/tax component only.\nIf any other field cannot be determined, use empty string.`;",
                "old_str": "const EXTRACTION_PROMPT = `You are extracting expense data from an invoice, receipt, or bill.\nThe OCR may contain errors. Use context clues to correct obvious mistakes.\n\nReturn ONLY valid JSON (no markdown, no explanation):\n{\n  \"vendor\": \"company name\",\n  \"description\": \"brief description of what this expense is for\",\n  \"total\": \"123.45\",\n  \"tax\": \"15.00\",\n  \"date\": \"2026-01-15\",\n  \"category\": \"one of: Advertising & Marketing, Communication (Phone & Internet), Depreciation, Entertainment (50% deductible), General & Administrative, Insurance, Interest & Bank Fees, Legal & Accounting, Motor Vehicle, Office Expenses, Rent & Rates, Repairs & Maintenance, Software & Subscriptions, Subcontractors, Travel & Accommodation, Other\",\n  \"confidence\": \"high or low\"\n}\n\nIf a field cannot be determined, use empty string. Date format must be YYYY-MM-DD.\nTotal should be the final amount including tax. Tax should be the GST/tax component only.`;",
                "path": "/Users/sdonthineni/projects/cloudpro/cloudpro-invoice/amplify/functions/process-expense-email/handler.ts",
                "summary": "Update AI prompt to explicitly not guess dates - only use date from the actual receipt"
              },
              "orig_args": {
                "command": "str_replace",
                "new_str": "const EXTRACTION_PROMPT = `You are extracting expense data from an invoice, receipt, or bill.\nThe OCR may contain errors. Use context clues to correct obvious mistakes.\n\nReturn ONLY valid JSON (no markdown, no explanation):\n{\n  \"vendor\": \"company name\",\n  \"description\": \"brief description of what this expense is for\",\n  \"total\": \"123.45\",\n  \"tax\": \"15.00\",\n  \"date\": \"2026-01-15\",\n  \"category\": \"one of: Advertising & Marketing, Communication (Phone & Internet), Depreciation, Entertainment (50% deductible), General & Administrative, Insurance, Interest & Bank Fees, Legal & Accounting, Motor Vehicle, Office Expenses, Rent & Rates, Repairs & Maintenance, Software & Subscriptions, Subcontractors, Travel & Accommodation, Other\",\n  \"confidence\": \"high or low\"\n}\n\nIMPORTANT: The date must come from the receipt/invoice itself (invoice date, receipt date, transaction date).\nDo NOT guess or infer a date. If no date is clearly visible on the document, return an empty string for date.\nDate format must be YYYY-MM-DD. Total should be the final amount including tax. Tax is the GST/tax component only.\nIf any other field cannot be determined, use empty string.`;",
                "old_str": "const EXTRACTION_PROMPT = `You are extracting expense data from an invoice, receipt, or bill.\nThe OCR may contain errors. Date format must be YYYY-MM-DD.\nTotal should be the final amount including tax. Tax should be the GST/tax component only.`;",

            "tool_use_results": [
              {
                "tool_use_id": "tooluse_NRfMRz0AmMaMUsxspTfH1S",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "Text": "        ) : (\n          <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n            {Object.entries(\n              filtered.reduce((groups: Record<string, typeof filtered>, e) => {\n                const d = new Date(e.date);\n                const key = d.toLocaleDateString('en-NZ', { month: 'long', year: 'numeric' });\n                (groups[key] = groups[key] || []).push(e);\n                return groups;\n              }, {})\n            ).map(([month, items]) => {\n              const monthTotal = items.reduce((s: number, e: any) => s + (e.amount || 0), 0);\n              return (\n                <div key={month}>\n                  <div className={`flex items-center justify-between mb-2 px-1`}>\n                    <h3 className={`text-sm font-semibold ${dark ? 'text-slate-300' : 'text-gray-700'}`}>{month}</h3>\n                    <span className={`text-sm font-medium ${dark ? 'text-slate-400' : 'text-gray-500'}`}>${monthTotal.toFixed(2)} · {items.length} items</span>\n                  </div>\n                  <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n                    {items.map((expense: any) => {\n                      const needsReceipt = (expense.amount || 0) > 50 && !expense.receiptUrl;\n                      return (\n                        <div key={expense.id}\n                          className={`${dark ? 'bg-black rounded-lg border border-purple-500/30 px-4 py-3' : 'bg-white rounded-lg shadow-sm border border-gray-200 px-4 py-3'}`}>\n                          <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between\">\n                            <Link href={`/expenses/${expense.id}/edit`} className=\"flex items-center gap-3 flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                              {thumbnails[expense.id] ? (\n                                <img src={thumbnails[expense.id]} alt=\"Receipt\"\n                                  onClick={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); setViewingReceipt(thumbnails[expense.id]); }}\n                                  className=\"w-8 h-8 rounded object-cover flex-shrink-0 border border-gray-200 cursor-zoom-in hover:opacity-80\" />\n                              ) : (\n                                <span className=\"text-lg\">{categoryIcon(expense.category || 'Other')}</span>\n                              )}\n                              <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n                                <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n                                  <p className={`text-sm font-medium truncate ${dark ? 'text-white' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>{expense.description}</p>\n                                  {needsReceipt && <AlertTriangle className=\"w-3 h-3 text-amber-500 flex-shrink-0\" />}\n                                </div>\n                                <p className={`text-xs ${t.textMuted}`}>\n                                  {expense.category || 'Other'} · {new Date(expense.date).toLocaleDateString('en-NZ', { day: 'numeric', month: 'short' })}\n                                  {expense.gstClaimable && ' · GST'}\n                                </p>\n                              </div>\n                            </Link>\n                            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 flex-shrink-0 ml-3\">\n                              <div className=\"text-right\">\n                                <p className={`text-sm font-bold ${dark ? 'text-white' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>${expense.amount?.toFixed(2)}</p>"
                  }
                ],
                "status": "Success"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        "timestamp": null,
        "images": null

        "ToolUse": {
          "message_id": "67b0b433-417d-4dc4-987a-c4cb0144f6ee",
          "content": "Now fix the sort that also assumes date exists:",
          "tool_uses": [
            {
              "id": "tooluse_CuT4hMPgRhWzXaliZg6pvE",
              "name": "fs_write",
              "orig_name": "fs_write",
              "args": {
                "command": "str_replace",
                "new_str": "      const sorted = data.sort((a: any, b: any) => new Date(b.date || 0).getTime() - new Date(a.date || 0).getTime());",
                "old_str": "      const sorted = data.sort((a: any, b: any) => new Date(b.date).getTime() - new Date(a.date).getTime());",
                "path": "/Users/sdonthineni/projects/cloudpro/cloudpro-invoice/app/expenses/page.tsx",
                "summary": "Handle missing date in expense sorting - dateless expenses sort to bottom"
              },
              "orig_args": {
                "command": "str_replace",
                "new_str": "      const sorted = data.sort((a: any, b: any) => new Date(b.date || 0).getTime() - new Date(a.date || 0).getTime());",
                "old_str": "      const sorted = data.sort((a: any, b: any) => new Date(b.date).getTime() - new Date(a.date).getTime());",
                "path": "/Users/sdonthineni/projects/cloudpro/cloudpro-invoice/app/expenses/page.tsx",
                "summary": "Handle missing date in expense sorting - dateless expenses sort to bottom"
              }
            }

            "tool_use_results": [
              {
                "tool_use_id": "tooluse_Xetcpi1xnEDt8WiROHHULT",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "Text": "      try {\n        const client = generateClient<Schema>();\n        const { data } = await client.models.Expense.get({ id: params.id });\n        if (data) {\n          setFormData({\n            description: data.description || '', category: data.category || 'Other',\n            amount: data.amount?.toString() || '', gstClaimable: data.gstClaimable ?? true,\n            date: data.date ? new Date(data.date).toISOString().split('T')[0] : '',\n            notes: data.notes || '', status: data.status || 'PENDING'\n          });\n          if (data.receiptUrl) {\n            setExistingReceipt(data.receiptUrl);\n            try {\n              const { getUrl } = await import('aws-amplify/storage');\n              const { url } = await getUrl({ path: data.receiptUrl });\n              setReceiptPreviewUrl(url.toString());"
                  }
                ],
                "status": "Success"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        "timestamp": null,
        "images": null
      },
      "assistant": {
        "ToolUse": {
          "message_id": "6686e20e-3f45-4608-bad2-af3e4b1431aa",
          "content": "The edit page already handles empty date fine — it sets it to `''` which shows an empty date picker. Let me also make sure the new expense form doesn't require date anymore:",
          "tool_uses": [

                "tool_use_id": "tooluse_fkSEtirMqskr1g0aMev1bI",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "Text": "    handleScanReceipt(file);\n  };\n\n  const amount = parseFloat(formData.amount) || 0;\n  const gstAmount = formData.gstClaimable ? amount * 3 / 23 : 0;\n  const amountExGst = amount - gstAmount;\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    const result = validate(expenseSchema, {\n      description: formData.description, amount, date: formData.date, category: formData.category,\n    });\n    if (!result.success) { setErrors(result.errors); toast.error('Please fix the errors below'); return; }\n    // Block if expense date is in a closed FY\n    if (getFY(formData.date) < currentFY() && !isPreviousFYOpen()) {\n      toast.error(`${fyShort(getFY(formData.date))} is closed — cutoff was May 15`); return;\n    }\n    setErrors({});\n    setSaving(true);\n    try {\n      let receiptUrl = '';"
                  }
                ],
                "status": "Success"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        "timestamp": null,
        "images": null
      },

          "content": "The manual new expense form still defaults to today's date which is fine for manual entry. The validation schema might enforce date though — let me check:",

                    "Text": "export const expenseSchema = z.object({\n  description: z.string().min(1, 'Description is required'),\n  amount: z.number().positive('Amount must be greater than 0'),\n  date: z.string().min(1, 'Date is required'),\n  category: z.string().min(1, 'Category is required'),\n});\n\nexport const clientSchema = z.object({\n  name: z.string().min(1, 'Client name is required'),\n  email: z.string().email('Invalid email address').or(z.literal('')).optional(),\n});\n\nexport const companySchema = z.object({"

          "content": "The validation schema requires date for the manual form — that's correct, we want to keep that for manual entry.           "ToolUseResults": {
            "tool_use_results": [
              {
                "tool_use_id": "tooluse_eOybq2KF1dhfVjAlT8M3QQ",

                    "Json": {
                      "numMatches": 2,
                      "numFiles": 1,
                      "truncated": false,
                      "results": [
                        {
                          "file": "/Users/sdonthineni/projects/cloudpro/cloudpro-invoice/amplify/functions/process-expense-email/handler.ts",
                          "count": 2,
                          "matches": [
                            "278:      date: expense.date || '',",
                            "279:      notes: `Auto-created from email (${senderEmail}). Confidence: ${expense.confidence}${!expense.date ? '. Date not found on receipt — please review.' : ''}`,"
                          ]
                        }
                      ]
                    }
                  }
                ],
                "status": "Success"

        },
        "timestamp": null,
        "images": null
      },
      "assistant": {
        "Response": {
          "message_id": "d9f3f833-97fa-4242-95b4-b99863e10074",
          "content": "All looks good. Here's a summary of the date handling:\n\n**What changed:**\n\n1. `Expense.date` — changed from `required()` to optional in the schema, so email-ingested expenses without a receipt date can be saved\n\n2. Lambda handler — if AI can't find a date on the receipt:\n   - Saves empty string for `date`\n   - Adds note: \"Date not found on receipt — please review.\"\n\n3. AI prompt — explicitly tells the model: \"Do NOT guess or infer a date. If no date is clearly visible on the document, return an empty string.\"\n\n4. Expenses list page — handles missing dates gracefully:\n   - Groups dateless expenses under \"No Date\"\n   - Shows \"No date\" in the row instead of crashing\n   - Sorts dateless expenses to the bottom\n\n5. Manual expense form — still requires date (validated by zod schema), which is correct since you're entering it yourself\n\nThe user sees the expense in their list, notices \"No date\", clicks to edit, and fills it in. Clean workflow.\n\nWant me to continue with creating the settings page for managing the ingest email + whitelist?"
        }
      },

              {
                "tool_use_id": "tooluse_JUdklZ4pO81VB7JdBaan0s",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "Text": "import { type ClientSchema, a, defineData } from '@aws-amplify/backend';\nimport { sendInvoiceEmail } from '../functions/send-invoice-email/resource';\nimport { processReceipt } from '../functions/process-receipt/resource';\nimport { processExpenseEmail } from '../functions/process-expense-email/resource';\n\nconst schema = a.schema({\n  // Company Profile - stores user's business details\n  CompanyProfile: a\n    .model({\n      companyName: a.string().required(),\n      companyEmail: a.string(),\n      companyPhone: a.string(),\n      companyAddress: a.string(),\n      companyCity: a.string(),\n      companyState: a.string(),\n      companyPostalCode: a.string(),\n      companyCountry: a.string().default('New Zealand'),\n      gstNumber: a.string(), // NZ GST number\n      bankAccount: a.string(), // NZ bank account\n      defaultCurrency: a.string().default('NZD'),\n      defaultGstRate: a.float().default(15), // NZ GST is 15%\n      logoUrl: a.string(),\n      // Email preferences\n      emailSubjectTemplate: a.string().default('Invoice {invoiceNumber} from {companyName}'),\n      emailBodyTemplate: a.string().default('Please find attached invoice {invoiceNumber} for {total}. Payment is due by {dueDate}. Thank you for your business.'),\n      emailReplyTo: a.string(),\n      emailCcSelf: a.boolean().default(true),\n      defaultTemplate: a.string().default('modern'),\n      // Reminder settings\n      reminderEnabled: a.boolean().default(false),\n      reminderDaysBefore: a.string().default('7,3,1'),\n      reminderDaysAfter: a.string().default('1,7,14'),\n      reminderSubjectTemplate: a.string().default('Reminder: Invoice {invoiceNumber} from {companyName}'),\n      reminderBodyTemplate: a.string().default('This is a friendly reminder that invoice {invoiceNumber} for {total} is due on {dueDate}. Please arrange payment at your earliest convenience.'),\n      userId: a.string().required(),\n      user: a.belongsTo('User', 'userId'),\n    })\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.owner()),\n\n  User: a\n    .model({\n      email: a.string().required(),\n      firstName: a.string(),\n      lastName: a.string(),\n      companyProfile: a.hasOne('CompanyProfile', 'userId'),\n      invoices: a.hasMany('Invoice', 'userId'),\n      clients: a.hasMany('Client', 'userId'),\n      expenses: a.hasMany('Expense', 'userId'),\n    })\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.owner()),\n\n  Client: a\n    .model({\n      name: a.string().required(),\n      email: a.string(),\n      phone: a.string(),\n      address: a.string(),\n      city: a.string(),\n      state: a.string(),\n      postalCode: a.string(),\n      country: a.string().default('New Zealand'),\n      notes: a.string(),\n      userId: a.string().required(),\n      user: a.belongsTo('User', 'userId'),\n      invoices: a.hasMany('Invoice', 'clientId'),\n    })\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.owner()),\n\n  Invoice: a\n    .model({\n      invoiceNumber: a.string().required(),\n      clientName: a.string().required(),\n      clientEmail: a.string(),\n      clientAddress: a.string(),\n      issueDate: a.datetime().required(),\n      dueDate: a.datetime(),\n      items: a.hasMany('InvoiceItem', 'invoiceId'),\n      notes: a.string(),\n      paymentTerms: a.string().default('Due by 20th of the month'),\n      subtotal: a.float().required(),\n      gstRate: a.float().default(15), // NZ GST rate\n      gstAmount: a.float(),\n      total: a.float().required(),\n      currency: a.string().default('NZD'),\n      status: a.enum(['DRAFT', 'SENT', 'PAID', 'OVERDUE', 'CANCELLED']),\n      pdfUrl: a.string(),\n      portalToken: a.string(),\n      lastReminderSent: a.datetime(),\n      reminderCount: a.integer().default(0),\n      // Company details at time of invoice (snapshot)\n      companyName: a.string(),\n      companyEmail: a.string(),\n      companyPhone: a.string(),\n      companyAddress: a.string(),\n      gstNumber: a.string(),\n      bankAccount: a.string(),\n      userId: a.string().required(),\n      user: a.belongsTo('User', 'userId'),\n      clientId: a.string(),\n      client: a.belongsTo('Client', 'clientId'),\n    })\n    .authorization((allow) => [allow.owner(), allow.publicApiKey().to(['read'])]),\n\n  InvoiceItem: a\n    .model({\n      description: a.string().required(),\n      wbs: a.string(), // Work Breakdown Structure / Project code\n      quantity: a.float().required(),\n      unitPrice: a.float().required(),\n      amount: a.float().required(),\n      invoiceId: a.string().required(),\n      invoice: a.belongsTo('Invoice', 'invoiceId'),\n    })\n    .authorization((allow) => [allow.owner(), allow.publicApiKey().to(['read'])]),\n\n  Expense: a\n    .model({\n      description: a.string().required(),\n      category: a.string(),\n      amount: a.float().required(),\n      amountExGst: a.float(), // Amount excluding GST\n      gstAmount: a.float(), // GST component\n      gstClaimable: a.boolean().default(true), // Can claim GST back\n      date: a.datetime(),\n      receiptUrl: a.string(),\n      notes: a.string(),\n      status: a.enum(['PENDING', 'APPROVED', 'REJECTED']),\n      // Email ingest fields\n      source: a.enum(['manual', 'email']),\n      sourceConfidence: a.enum(['high', 'low']),\n      userId: a.string().required(),\n      user: a.belongsTo('User', 'userId'),\n    })\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.owner()),\n\n  // Stores each company's unique ingest email key\n  ExpenseIngestConfig: a\n    .model({\n      ingestKey: a.string().required(), // unique key for email address\n      ingestEmail: a.string().required(), // full email address for display\n      active: a.boolean().default(true),\n      whitelistedEmails: a.string().array(), // only process emails from these senders\n      userId: a.string().required(),\n      user: a.belongsTo('User', 'userId'),\n    })\n    .secondaryIndexes((index) => [index('ingestKey')])\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.owner()),\n\n  RecurringInvoice: a\n    .model({\n      clientId: a.string().required(),\n      clientName: a.string().required(),\n      clientEmail: a.string(),\n      frequency: a.enum(['WEEKLY', 'FORTNIGHTLY', 'MONTHLY', 'QUARTERLY', 'ANNUALLY']),\n      nextDate: a.date().required(),\n      endDate: a.date(),\n      active: a.boolean().default(true),\n      lineItems: a.json(), // JSON array of {description, wbs, quantity, unitPrice, amount}\n      notes: a.string(),\n      paymentTerms: a.string().default('Due by 20th of the month'),\n      currency: a.string().default('NZD'),\n      generatedCount: a.integer().default(0),\n      lastGeneratedDate: a.date(),\n      userId: a.string().required(),\n    })\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.owner()),\n\n  // Custom mutation for sending invoice emails\n  sendInvoiceEmail: a\n    .mutation()\n    .arguments({\n      to: a.string().required(),\n      cc: a.string(),\n      replyTo: a.string(),\n      subject: a.string().required(),\n      body: a.string().required(),\n      pdfBase64: a.string().required(),\n      fileName: a.string().required(),\n      fromName: a.string(),\n    })\n    .returns(a.json())\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.authenticated())\n    .handler(a.handler.function(sendInvoiceEmail)),\n\n  processReceipt: a\n    .mutation()\n    .arguments({\n      imageBase64: a.string().required(),\n    })\n    .returns(a.json())\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.authenticated())\n    .handler(a.handler.function(processReceipt)),\n});\n\nexport type Schema = ClientSchema<typeof schema>;\n\nexport const data = defineData({\n  schema,\n  authorizationModes: {\n    defaultAuthorizationMode: 'userPool',\n    apiKeyAuthorizationMode: {\n      expiresInDays: 365,\n    },\n  },\n});"
                  }
                ],
                "status": "Success"
              }

              {
                "tool_use_id": "tooluse_Q8eLDVzcVBmPMOpGtxeJ1D",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "Text": "'use client';\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { useAuth } from '@/lib/auth-context';\nimport { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';\nimport { generateClient } from 'aws-amplify/data';\nimport { uploadData, getUrl } from 'aws-amplify/storage';\nimport type { Schema } from '@/amplify/data/resource';\nimport { useTheme } from '@/lib/theme-context';\nimport { tc } from '@/lib/theme-classes';\nimport { useToast } from '@/lib/toast-context';\nimport { TEMPLATES } from '@/lib/generate-pdf';\nimport type { TemplateName } from '@/lib/generate-pdf';\n\nconst client = generateClient<Schema>();\n\nexport default function CompanyProfilePage() {\n  const { user, loading: authLoading } = useAuth();\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const { theme } = useTheme();\n  const t = tc(theme);\n  const toast = useToast();\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [logoFile, setLogoFile] = useState<File | null>(null);\n  const [logoPreview, setLogoPreview] = useState<string>('');\n  const [profile, setProfile] = useState({\n    companyName: '', companyEmail: '', companyPhone: '', companyAddress: '',\n    companyCity: '', companyState: '', companyPostalCode: '', companyCountry: 'New Zealand',\n    gstNumber: '', bankAccount: '', defaultCurrency: 'NZD', defaultGstRate: 15,\n    defaultTemplate: 'modern' as TemplateName,\n  });\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!authLoading && !user) router.push('/auth/login');\n  }, [user, authLoading, router]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (user) {\n      (async () => {\n        try {\n          setLoading(true);\n          const { data } = await client.models.CompanyProfile.list();\n          if (data && data.length > 0) {\n            const e = data[0];\n            setProfile({\n              companyName: e.companyName || '', companyEmail: e.companyEmail || '',\n              companyPhone: e.companyPhone || '', companyAddress: e.companyAddress || '',\n              companyCity: e.companyCity || '', companyState: e.companyState || '',\n              companyPostalCode: e.companyPostalCode || '', companyCountry: e.companyCountry || 'New Zealand',\n              gstNumber: e.gstNumber || '', bankAccount: e.bankAccount || '',\n              defaultCurrency: e.defaultCurrency || 'NZD', defaultGstRate: e.defaultGstRate || 15,\n              defaultTemplate: (e.defaultTemplate as TemplateName) || 'modern',\n            });\n            if (e.logoUrl) {\n              try {\n                const { url } = await getUrl({ path: e.logoUrl });\n                setLogoPreview(url.toString());\n              } catch {}\n            }\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          console.error('Error loading profile:', error);\n        } finally {\n          setLoading(false);\n        }\n      })();\n    }\n  }, [user]);\n\n  async function handleSubmit(e: React.FormEvent) {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setSaving(true);\n    try {\n      let logoUrl: string | undefined;\n      if (logoFile) {\n        const result = await uploadData({\n          path: ({identityId}) => `invoices/${identityId}/logo-${Date.now()}.${logoFile.name.split('.').pop()}`,\n          data: logoFile,\n          options: { contentType: logoFile.type },\n        }).result;\n        logoUrl = result.path;\n      }\n      const { data: existing } = await client.models.CompanyProfile.list();\n      const saveData = { ...profile, ...(logoUrl && { logoUrl }) };\n      if (existing && existing.length > 0) {\n        await client.models.CompanyProfile.update({ id: existing[0].id, ...saveData });\n      } else {\n        await client.models.CompanyProfile.create({ ...saveData, userId: user!.id });\n      }\n      toast.success('Profile saved');\n      router.push('/dashboard');\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error saving profile:', error);\n      toast.error('Failed to save profile');\n    } finally {\n      setSaving(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (authLoading || loading) {\n    return <div className=\"min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center\"><div className={t.textMuted}>Loading...</div></div>;\n  }\n  if (!user) return null;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-3xl mx-auto px-4 py-8\">\n      <div className=\"mb-8\">\n        <h1 className={theme === 'dark' ? 'text-3xl font-bold text-white' : 'text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900'}>Company Profile</h1>\n        <p className={`mt-1 ${t.textMuted}`}>Set up your business details for invoices</p>\n      </div>\n\n      <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className={`${t.card} space-y-6`}>\n        {/* Logo Upload */}\n        <div>\n          <h2 className={`${t.sectionTitle} mb-4`}>Company Logo</h2>\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-6\">\n            {(logoPreview || logoFile) ? (\n              <img src={logoFile ? URL.createObjectURL(logoFile) : logoPreview}\n                alt=\"Logo\" className=\"w-20 h-20 rounded-lg object-contain border border-gray-200\" />\n            ) : (\n              <div className={`w-20 h-20 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-3xl ${theme === 'dark' ? 'bg-purple-900/20 border-2 border-purple-500/30' : 'bg-gray-100 border-2 border-gray-200'}`}>🏢</div>\n            )}\n            <div>\n              <label className={`inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg cursor-pointer text-sm ${theme === 'dark' ? 'bg-purple-900/30 border border-purple-500/40 text-purple-400 hover:bg-purple-900/50' : 'bg-indigo-50 border border-indigo-200 text-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-100'}`}>\n                {logoPreview || logoFile ? 'Change Logo' : 'Upload Logo'}\n                <input type=\"file\" accept=\"image/*\" className=\"hidden\"\n                  onChange={(e) => setLogoFile(e.target.files?.[0] || null)} />\n              </label>\n              <p className={`text-xs mt-2 ${t.textMuted}`}>PNG or JPG, will appear on invoices</p>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <h2 className={`${t.sectionTitle} mb-4`}>Company Information</h2>\n          <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4\">\n            <div className=\"md:col-span-2\">\n              <label className={t.label}>Company Name *</label>\n              <input type=\"text\" required value={profile.companyName}\n                onChange={(e) => setProfile({ ...profile, companyName: e.target.value })} className={t.input} />\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <label className={t.label}>Email</label>\n              <input type=\"email\" value={profile.companyEmail}\n                onChange={(e) => setProfile({ ...profile, companyEmail: e.target.value })} className={t.input} />\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <label className={t.label}>Phone</label>\n              <input type=\"tel\" value={profile.companyPhone}\n                onChange={(e) => setProfile({ ...profile, companyPhone: e.target.value })} className={t.input} />\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"md:col-span-2\">\n              <label className={t.label}>Address</label>\n              <input type=\"text\" value={profile.companyAddress}\n                onChange={(e) => setProfile({ ...profile, companyAddress: e.target.value })} className={t.input} />\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <label className={t.label}>City</label>\n              <input type=\"text\" value={profile.companyCity}\n                onChange={(e) => setProfile({ ...profile, companyCity: e.target.value })} className={t.input} />\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <label className={t.label}>State/Region</label>\n              <input type=\"text\" value={profile.companyState}\n                onChange={(e) => setProfile({ ...profile, companyState: e.target.value })} className={t.input} />\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <label className={t.label}>Postal Code</label>\n              <input type=\"text\" value={profile.companyPostalCode}\n                onChange={(e) => setProfile({ ...profile, companyPostalCode: e.target.value })} className={t.input} />\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <label className={t.label}>Country</label>\n              <input type=\"text\" value={profile.companyCountry}\n                onChange={(e) => setProfile({ ...profile, companyCountry: e.target.value })} className={t.input} />\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <h2 className={`${t.sectionTitle} mb-4`}>Tax & Banking</h2>\n          <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4\">\n            <div>\n              <label className={t.label}>GST Number</label>\n              <input type=\"text\" value={profile.gstNumber} placeholder=\"12-345-678\"\n                onChange={(e) => setProfile({ ...profile, gstNumber: e.target.value })} className={t.input} />\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <label className={t.label}>Bank Account</label>\n              <input type=\"text\" value={profile.bankAccount} placeholder=\"12-3456-7890123-00\"\n                onChange={(e) => setProfile({ ...profile, bankAccount: e.target.value })} className={t.input} />\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <label className={t.label}>Default Currency</label>\n              <input type=\"text\" value={profile.defaultCurrency} readOnly\n                className={`${t.input} opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed`} />\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <label className={t.label}>Default GST Rate (%)</label>\n              <input type=\"number\" value={profile.defaultGstRate} readOnly\n                className={`${t.input} opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed`} />\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <h2 className={`${t.sectionTitle} mb-4`}>Invoice Template</h2>\n          <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4\">\n            {TEMPLATES.map(tmpl => (\n              <button key={tmpl.id} type=\"button\"\n                onClick={() => setProfile({ ...profile, defaultTemplate: tmpl.id })}\n                className={`p-4 rounded-lg border-2 text-left transition-all ${\n                  profile.defaultTemplate === tmpl.id\n                    ? theme === 'dark' ? 'border-purple-500 bg-purple-500/10' : 'border-indigo-600 bg-indigo-50'\n                    : theme === 'dark' ? 'border-purple-500/20 hover:border-purple-500/50' : 'border-gray-200 hover:border-gray-300'\n                }`}>\n                <div className={`text-sm font-medium ${theme === 'dark' ? 'text-white' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>{tmpl.name}</div>\n                <div className={`text-xs mt-1 ${t.textMuted}`}>{tmpl.description}</div>\n              </button>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex justify-end gap-3 pt-4\">\n          <button type=\"button\" onClick={() => router.push('/dashboard')} className={t.btnSecondary}>Cancel</button>\n          <button type=\"submit\" disabled={saving} className={t.btnPrimary}>\n            {saving ? 'Saving...' : 'Save Profile'}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </form>\n    </div>\n  );\n}"
                  }
                ],
                "status": "Success"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        "timestamp": null,
        "images": null

          "message_id": "b5419140-8885-43fc-a830-d38d1fb102fb",
          "content": "Now remove the standalone `ExpenseIngestConfig` model:",
          "tool_uses": [
            {
              "id": "tooluse_WZ5znj1DgUfGoplnrd726a",
              "name": "fs_write",
              "orig_name": "fs_write",
              "args": {
                "command": "str_replace",
                "new_str": "  RecurringInvoice: a",
                "old_str": "  // Stores each company's unique ingest email key\n  ExpenseIngestConfig: a\n    .model({\n      ingestKey: a.string().required(), // unique key for email address\n      ingestEmail: a.string().required(), // full email address for display\n      active: a.boolean().default(true),\n      whitelistedEmails: a.string().array(), // only process emails from these senders\n      userId: a.string().required(),\n      user: a.belongsTo('User', 'userId'),\n    })\n    .secondaryIndexes((index) => [index('ingestKey')])\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.owner()),\n\n  RecurringInvoice: a",
                "path": "/Users/sdonthineni/projects/cloudpro/cloudpro-invoice/amplify/data/resource.ts",
                "summary": "Remove standalone ExpenseIngestConfig model - now lives on CompanyProfile"
              },
              "orig_args": {
                "command": "str_replace",
                "new_str": "  RecurringInvoice: a",
                "old_str": "  // Stores each company's unique ingest email key\n  ExpenseIngestConfig: a\n    .model({\n      ingestKey: a.string().required(), // unique key for email address\n      ingestEmail: a.string().required(), // full email address for display\n      active: a.boolean().default(true),\n      whitelistedEmails: a.string().array(), // only process emails from these senders\n      userId: a.string().required(),\n      user: a.belongsTo('User', 'userId'),\n    })\n    .secondaryIndexes((index) => [index('ingestKey')])\n    .authorization((allow) => allow.owner()),\n\n  RecurringInvoice: a",
                "path": "/Users/sdonthineni/projects/cloudpro/cloudpro-invoice/amplify/data/resource.ts",
                "summary": "Remove standalone ExpenseIngestConfig model - now lives on CompanyProfile"
              }
            }
          ]
        }

        "ToolUse": {
          "message_id": "84f64e49-34de-4ee5-9e13-cd582b977af4",
          "content": "",
          "tool_uses": [
            {
              "id": "tooluse_G5ghuoAf06c2gHezeYsued",
              "name": "fs_write",
              "orig_name": "fs_write",
              "args": {
                "command": "str_replace",
                "new_str": "async function lookupIngestConfig(ingestKey: string): Promise<IngestConfig | undefined> {\n  const result = await ddb.send(new QueryCommand({\n    TableName: COMPANY_PROFILE_TABLE,\n    IndexName: 'byExpenseIngestKey',\n    KeyConditionExpression: 'expenseIngestKey = :key',\n    ExpressionAttributeValues: { ':key': ingestKey },\n    Limit: 1,\n  }));\n  return result.Items?.[0] as IngestConfig | undefined;\n}",
                "old_str": "async function lookupIngestConfig(ingestKey: string): Promise<IngestConfig | undefined> {\n  const result = await ddb.send(new QueryCommand({\n    TableName: INGEST_CONFIG_TABLE,\n    IndexName: 'byIngestKey',\n    KeyConditionExpression: 'ingestKey = :key',\n    ExpressionAttributeValues: { ':key': ingestKey },\n    Limit: 1,\n  }));\n  return result.Items?.[0] as IngestConfig | undefined;\n}",
                "path": "/Users/sdonthineni/projects/cloudpro/cloudpro-invoice/amplify/functions/process-expense-email/handler.ts",
                "summary": "Query CompanyProfile table by expenseIngestKey GSI"
