          "description": "Retrieve wiki page content by wikiIdentifier and path.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "properties": {
                "project": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The project name or ID where the wiki is located."
                },
                "path": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The path of the wiki page to retrieve content for."
                },
                "wikiIdentifier": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The unique identifier of the wiki."
                }
              },
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "type": "object",
              "required": [
                "wikiIdentifier",
                "project",
                "path"
              ]
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "repo_reply_to_comment",
          "description": "Replies to a specific comment on a pull request.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "type": "object",
              "required": [
                "repositoryId",
                "pullRequestId",
                "threadId",
                "content"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "content": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The content of the comment to be added."
                },
                "repositoryId": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The ID of the repository where the pull request is located."
                },
                "project": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Project ID or project name (optional)"
                },
                "pullRequestId": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "The ID of the pull request where the comment thread exists."
                },
                "threadId": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "The ID of the thread to which the comment will be added."
                }
              },
              "additionalProperties": false
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "wit_get_work_items_batch_by_ids",
          "description": "Retrieve list of work items by IDs in batch.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "type": "object",
              "required": [
                "project",
                "ids"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "ids": {
                  "items": {
                    "type": "number"
                  },
                  "type": "array",
                  "description": "The IDs of the work items to retrieve."
                },
                "project": {
                  "description": "The name or ID of the Azure DevOps project.",
                  "type": "string"
                }
              },
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "additionalProperties": false
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "testplan_list_test_cases",
          "description": "Gets a list of test cases in the test plan.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "properties": {
                "project": {
                  "description": "The unique identifier (ID or name) of the Azure DevOps project.",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "planid": {
                  "description": "The ID of the test plan.",
                  "type": "number"
                },
                "suiteid": {
                  "description": "The ID of the test suite.",
                  "type": "number"
                }
              },
              "required": [
                "project",
                "planid",
                "suiteid"
              ],
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "type": "object",
              "additionalProperties": false
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "wit_list_backlogs",
          "description": "Revieve a list of backlogs for a given project and team.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "required": [
                "project",
                "team"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "team": {
                  "description": "The name or ID of the Azure DevOps team.",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "project": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The name or ID of the Azure DevOps project."
                }
              },
              "type": "object",
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "additionalProperties": false
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "work_assign_iterations",
          "description": "Assign existing iterations to a specific team in a project.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "properties": {
                "team": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The name or ID of the Azure DevOps team."
                },
                "iterations": {
                  "type": "array",
                  "items": {
                    "required": [
                      "identifier",
                      "path"
                    ],
                    "type": "object",
                    "properties": {
                      "path": {
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "The path of the iteration to assign, e.g., 'Project/Iteration'."
                      },
                      "identifier": {
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "The identifier of the iteration to assign."
                      }
                    },
                    "additionalProperties": false
                  },
                  "description": "An array of iterations to assign. Each iteration must have an identifier and a path."
                },
                "project": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The name or ID of the Azure DevOps project."
                }
              },
              "required": [
                "project",
                "team",
                "iterations"
              ],
              "type": "object",
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "wit_list_work_item_comments",
          "description": "Retrieve list of comments for a work item by ID.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "properties": {
                "workItemId": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "The ID of the work item to retrieve comments for."
                },
                "project": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The name or ID of the Azure DevOps project."
                },
                "top": {
                  "default": 50,
                  "description": "Optional number of comments to retrieve. Defaults to all comments.",
                  "type": "number"
                }
              },
              "type": "object",
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "required": [
                "project",
                "workItemId"
              ]
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "wiki_get_wiki",
          "description": "Get the wiki by wikiIdentifier",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "type": "object",
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "required": [
                "wikiIdentifier"
              ],
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "properties": {
                "wikiIdentifier": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The unique identifier of the wiki."
                },
                "project": {
                  "description": "The project name or ID where the wiki is located. If not provided, the default project will be used.",
                  "type": "string"
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "repo_get_pull_request_by_id",
          "description": "Get a pull request by its ID.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "properties": {
                "pullRequestId": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "The ID of the pull request to retrieve."
                },
                "repositoryId": {
                  "description": "The ID of the repository where the pull request is located.",
                  "type": "string"
                }
              },
              "type": "object",
              "required": [
                "repositoryId",
                "pullRequestId"
              ]
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "build_get_log_by_id",
          "description": "Get a specific build log by log ID.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "type": "object",
              "properties": {
                "endLine": {
                  "description": "Ending line number for the log content, defaults to the end of the log",
                  "type": "number"
                },
                "buildId": {
                  "description": "ID of the build to get the log for",
                  "type": "number"
                },
                "logId": {
                  "description": "ID of the log to retrieve",
                  "type": "number"
                },
                "project": {
                  "description": "Project ID or name to get the build log for",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "startLine": {
                  "description": "Starting line number for the log content, defaults to 0",
                  "type": "number"
                }
              },
              "required": [
                "project",
                "buildId",
                "logId"
              ],
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "build_get_status",
          "description": "Fetches the status of a specific build.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "required": [
                "project",
                "buildId"
              ],
              "type": "object",
              "properties": {
                "project": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Project ID or name to get the build status for"
                },
                "buildId": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "ID of the build to get the status for"
                }
              },
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "repo_list_branches_by_repo",
          "description": "Retrieve a list of branches for a given repository.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "type": "object",
              "properties": {
                "top": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "default": 100,
                  "description": "The maximum number of branches to return. Defaults to 100."
                },
                "repositoryId": {
                  "description": "The ID of the repository where the branches are located.",
                  "type": "string"
                }
              },
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "required": [
                "repositoryId"
              ],
              "additionalProperties": false
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "repo_get_repo_by_name_or_id",
          "description": "Get the repository by project and repository name or ID.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "properties": {
                "project": {
                  "description": "Project name or ID where the repository is located.",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "repositoryNameOrId": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Repository name or ID."
                }
              },
              "required": [
                "project",
                "repositoryNameOrId"
              ],
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "type": "object"
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "repo_search_commits",
          "description": "Searches for commits in a repository",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "properties": {
                "toCommit": {
                  "description": "Ending commit ID",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "skip": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "Number of commits to skip",
                  "default": 0
                },
                "includeWorkItems": {
                  "description": "Include associated work items",
                  "default": false,
                  "type": "boolean"
                },
                "top": {
                  "description": "Maximum number of commits to return",
                  "type": "number",
                  "default": 10
                },
                "version": {
                  "description": "The name of the branch, tag or commit to filter commits by",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "repository": {
                  "description": "Repository name or ID",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "versionType": {
                  "enum": [
                    "Branch",
                    "Tag",
                    "Commit"
                  ],
                  "description": "The meaning of the version parameter, e.g., branch, tag or commit",
                  "default": "Branch",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "project": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Project name or ID"
                },
                "includeLinks": {
                  "description": "Include commit links",
                  "default": false,
                  "type": "boolean"
                },
                "fromCommit": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Starting commit ID"
                }
              },
              "required": [
                "project",
                "repository"
              ],
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "type": "object",
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "repo_list_pull_request_threads",
          "description": "Retrieve a list of comment threads for a pull request.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "type": "object",
              "properties": {
                "iteration": {
                  "description": "The iteration ID for which to retrieve threads. Optional, defaults to the latest iteration.",
                  "type": "number"
                },
                "repositoryId": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The ID of the repository where the pull request is located."
                },
                "top": {
                  "description": "The maximum number of threads to return.",
                  "type": "number",
                  "default": 100
                },
                "baseIteration": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "The base iteration ID for which to retrieve threads. Optional, defaults to the latest base iteration."
                },
                "project": {
                  "description": "Project ID or project name (optional)",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "skip": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "default": 0,
                  "description": "The number of threads to skip."
                },
                "pullRequestId": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "The ID of the pull request for which to retrieve threads."
                }
              },
              "required": [
                "repositoryId",
                "pullRequestId"
              ]
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "build_get_log",
          "description": "Retrieves the logs for a specific build.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "required": [
                "project",
                "buildId"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "project": {
                  "description": "Project ID or name to get the build log for",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "buildId": {
                  "description": "ID of the build to get the log for",
                  "type": "number"
                }
              },
              "type": "object",
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "search_code",
          "description": "Get the code search results for a given search text.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "required": [
                "searchRequest"
              ],
              "type": "object",
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "properties": {
                "searchRequest": {
                  "required": [
                    "searchText"
                  ],
                  "type": "object",
                  "additionalProperties": false,
                  "properties": {
                    "searchText": {
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "Search text to find in code"
                    },
                    "$skip": {
                      "default": 0,
                      "description": "Number of results to skip (for pagination)",
                      "type": "number"
                    },
                    "$top": {
                      "type": "number",
                      "default": 5,
                      "description": "Number of results to return (for pagination)"
                    },
                    "filters": {
                      "properties": {
                        "Branch": {
                          "description": "Filter in these branches",
                          "type": "array",
                          "items": {
                            "type": "string"
                          }
                        },
                        "CodeElement": {
                          "items": {
                            "type": "string"
                          },
                          "type": "array",
                          "description": "Filter for these code elements (e.g., classes, functions, symbols)"
                        },
                        "Project": {
                          "items": {
                            "type": "string"
                          },
                          "type": "array",
                          "description": "Filter in these projects"
                        },
                        "Repository": {
                          "items": {
                            "type": "string"
                          },
                          "type": "array",
                          "description": "Filter in these repositories"
                        },
                        "Path": {
                          "items": {
                            "type": "string"
                          },
                          "description": "Filter in these paths",
                          "type": "array"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object",
                      "additionalProperties": false
                    },
                    "includeFacets": {
                      "type": "boolean"
                    }
                  }
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "release_get_releases",
          "description": "Retrieves a list of releases for a given project.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "properties": {
                "releaseIdFilter": {
                  "type": "array",
                  "items": {
                    "type": "number"
                  },
                  "description": "Filter by specific release IDs"
                },
                "searchText": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Search text to filter releases"
                },
                "maxCreatedTime": {
                  "format": "date-time",
                  "type": "string",
                  "default": "2026-04-01T03:35:33.454Z",
                  "description": "Maximum created time for releases (default: now)"
                },
                "environmentStatusFilter": {
                  "description": "Environment status to filter releases",
                  "type": "number"
                },
                "top": {
                  "description": "Number of releases to return",
                  "type": "number"
                },
                "queryOrder": {
                  "enum": [
                    0,
                    1
                  ],
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "Order in which to return releases (default: Ascending)",
                  "default": 1
                },
                "definitionEnvironmentId": {
                  "description": "ID of the definition environment to filter releases",
                  "type": "number"
                },
                "definitionId": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "ID of the release definition to filter releases"
                },
                "minCreatedTime": {
                  "format": "date-time",
                  "description": "Minimum created time for releases (default: 7 days ago)",
                  "type": "string",
                  "default": "2026-03-25T03:35:33.453Z"
                },
                "artifactTypeId": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Filter releases by artifact type ID"
                },
                "sourceBranchFilter": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Filter releases by source branch"
                },
                "isDeleted": {
                  "default": false,
                  "type": "boolean",
                  "description": "Whether to include deleted releases (default: false)"
                },
                "tagFilter": {
                  "description": "Filter releases by tags",
                  "items": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "type": "array"
                },
                "continuationToken": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "Continuation token for pagination"
                },
                "project": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Project ID or name to get releases for"
                },
                "expand": {
                  "default": 0,
                  "description": "Expand options for releases",
                  "enum": [
                    0,
                    2,
                    4,
                    8,
                    16,
                    32,
                    64
                  ],
                  "type": "number"
                },
                "artifactVersionId": {
                  "description": "Filter releases by artifact version ID",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "createdBy": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "User ID or name who created the release"
                },
                "sourceId": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Filter releases by artifact source ID"
                },
                "path": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Path to filter releases"
                },
                "propertyFilters": {
                  "description": "Filter releases by properties",
                  "type": "array",
                  "items": {
                    "type": "string"
                  }
                },
                "statusFilter": {
                  "description": "Status of the releases to filter (default: Active)",
                  "type": "number",
                  "enum": [
                    0,
                    1,
                    2,
                    4
                  ],
                  "default": 2
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "repo_list_my_branches_by_repo",
          "description": "Retrieve a list of my branches for a given repository Id.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "required": [
                "repositoryId"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "repositoryId": {
                  "description": "The ID of the repository where the branches are located.",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "top": {
                  "default": 100,
                  "description": "The maximum number of branches to return.",
                  "type": "number"
                }
              },
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "type": "object"
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "build_get_builds",
          "description": "Retrieves a list of builds for a given project.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "type": "object",
              "properties": {
                "maxTime": {
                  "description": "Maximum finish time to filter builds",
                  "format": "date-time",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "top": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "Maximum number of builds to return"
                },
                "buildIds": {
                  "type": "array",
                  "items": {
                    "type": "number"
                  },
                  "description": "Array of build IDs to retrieve"
                },
                "properties": {
                  "items": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "description": "Array of property names to include in the results",
                  "type": "array"
                },
                "repositoryType": {
                  "enum": [
                    "TfsGit",
                    "GitHub",
                    "BitbucketCloud"
                  ],
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Type of repository to filter builds"
                },
                "requestedFor": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "User ID or name who requested the build"
                },
                "resultFilter": {
                  "description": "Result filter for the build (see BuildResult enum)",
                  "type": "number"
                },
                "repositoryId": {
                  "description": "Repository ID to filter builds",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "continuationToken": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Token for continuing paged results"
                },
                "queues": {
                  "type": "array",
                  "items": {
                    "type": "number"
                  },
                  "description": "Array of queue IDs to filter builds"
                },
                "buildNumber": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Build number to filter builds"
                },
                "maxBuildsPerDefinition": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "Maximum number of builds per definition"
                },
                "branchName": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Branch name to filter builds"
                },
                "tagFilters": {
                  "type": "array",
                  "description": "Array of tags to filter builds",
                  "items": {
                    "type": "string"
                  }
                },
                "queryOrder": {
                  "description": "Order in which builds are returned",
                  "default": 4,
                  "type": "number",
                  "enum": [
                    2,
                    3,
                    4,
                    5,
                    6,
                    7
                  ]
                },
                "reasonFilter": {
                  "description": "Reason filter for the build (see BuildReason enum)",
                  "type": "number"
                },
                "statusFilter": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "Status filter for the build (see BuildStatus enum)"
                },
                "minTime": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Minimum finish time to filter builds",
                  "format": "date-time"
                },
                "definitions": {
                  "description": "Array of build definition IDs to filter builds",
                  "type": "array",
                  "items": {
                    "type": "number"
                  }
                },
                "project": {
                  "description": "Project ID or name to get builds for",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "deletedFilter": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "Filter for deleted builds (see QueryDeletedOption enum)"
                }
              },
              "required": [
                "project"
              ],
              "additionalProperties": false
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "repo_resolve_comment",
          "description": "Resolves a specific comment thread on a pull request.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "properties": {
                "pullRequestId": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "The ID of the pull request where the comment thread exists."
                },
                "threadId": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "The ID of the thread to be resolved."
                },
                "repositoryId": {
                  "description": "The ID of the repository where the pull request is located.",
                  "type": "string"
                }
              },
              "type": "object",
              "required": [
                "repositoryId",
                "pullRequestId",
                "threadId"
              ]
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "wit_list_backlog_work_items",
          "description": "Retrieve a list of backlogs of for a given project, team, and backlog category",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "required": [
                "project",
                "team",
                "backlogId"
              ],
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "type": "object",
              "properties": {
                "project": {
                  "description": "The name or ID of the Azure DevOps project.",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "team": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The name or ID of the Azure DevOps team."
                },
                "backlogId": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The ID of the backlog category to retrieve work items from."
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "repo_list_pull_requests_by_project",
          "description": "Retrieve a list of pull requests for a given project Id or Name.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "properties": {
                "created_by_me": {
                  "default": false,
                  "description": "Filter pull requests created by the current user.",
                  "type": "boolean"
                },
                "i_am_reviewer": {
                  "default": false,
                  "description": "Filter pull requests where the current user is a reviewer.",
                  "type": "boolean"
                },
                "top": {
                  "description": "The maximum number of pull requests to return.",
                  "default": 100,
                  "type": "number"
                },
                "status": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "default": "active",
                  "description": "Filter pull requests by status. Defaults to 'active'.",
                  "enum": [
                    "abandoned",
                    "active",
                    "all",
                    "completed",
                    "notSet"
                  ]
                },
                "skip": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "default": 0,
                  "description": "The number of pull requests to skip."
                },
                "project": {
                  "description": "The name or ID of the Azure DevOps project.",
                  "type": "string"
                }
              },
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "required": [
                "project"
              ],
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "type": "object"
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "work_list_team_iterations",
          "description": "Retrieve a list of iterations for a specific team in a project.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "properties": {
                "project": {
                  "description": "The name or ID of the Azure DevOps project.",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "team": {
                  "description": "The name or ID of the Azure DevOps team.",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "timeframe": {
                  "enum": [
                    "current"
                  ],
                  "description": "The timeframe for which to retrieve iterations. Currently, only 'current' is supported.",
                  "type": "string"
                }
              },
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "required": [
                "project",
                "team"
              ],
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "type": "object"
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "repo_list_pull_requests_by_repo",
          "description": "Retrieve a list of pull requests for a given repository.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "properties": {
                "skip": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "default": 0,
                  "description": "The number of pull requests to skip."
                },
                "status": {
                  "enum": [
                    "abandoned",
                    "active",
                    "all",
                    "completed",
                    "notSet"
                  ],
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Filter pull requests by status. Defaults to 'active'.",
                  "default": "active"
                },
                "repositoryId": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The ID of the repository where the pull requests are located."
                },
                "top": {
                  "description": "The maximum number of pull requests to return.",
                  "type": "number",
                  "default": 100
                },
                "created_by_me": {
                  "description": "Filter pull requests created by the current user.",
                  "default": false,
                  "type": "boolean"
                },
                "i_am_reviewer": {
                  "description": "Filter pull requests where the current user is a reviewer.",
                  "type": "boolean",
                  "default": false
                }
              },
              "type": "object",
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "required": [
                "repositoryId"
              ]
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "repo_list_pull_requests_by_commits",
          "description": "Lists pull requests by commit IDs to find which pull requests contain specific commits",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "type": "object",
              "properties": {
                "project": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Project name or ID"
                },
                "queryType": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "default": "LastMergeCommit",
                  "enum": [
                    "NotSet",
                    "LastMergeCommit",
                    "Commit"
                  ],
                  "description": "Type of query to perform"
                },
                "commits": {
                  "items": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "type": "array",
                  "description": "Array of commit IDs to query for"
                },
                "repository": {
                  "description": "Repository name or ID",
                  "type": "string"
                }
              },
              "required": [
                "project",
                "repository",
                "commits"
              ]
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "wit_link_work_item_to_pull_request",
          "description": "Link a single work item to an existing pull request.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "properties": {
                "project": {
                  "description": "The name or ID of the Azure DevOps project.",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "pullRequestId": {
                  "description": "The ID of the pull request to link to.",
                  "type": "number"
                },
                "repositoryId": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The ID of the repository containing the pull request. Do not use the repository name here, use the ID instead."
                },
                "workItemId": {
                  "description": "The ID of the work item to link to the pull request.",
                  "type": "number"
                }
              },
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "type": "object",
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "required": [
                "project",
                "repositoryId",
                "pullRequestId",
                "workItemId"
              ]
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "wit_my_work_items",
          "description": "Retrieve a list of work items relevent to the authenticated user.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "type": "object",
              "properties": {
                "type": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "default": "assignedtome",
                  "enum": [
                    "assignedtome",
                    "myactivity"
                  ],
                  "description": "The type of work items to retrieve. Defaults to 'assignedtome'."
                },
                "includeCompleted": {
                  "default": false,
                  "description": "Whether to include completed work items. Defaults to false.",
                  "type": "boolean"
                },
                "project": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The name or ID of the Azure DevOps project."
                },
                "top": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "default": 50,
                  "description": "The maximum number of work items to return. Defaults to 50."
                }
              },
              "required": [
                "project"
              ],
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "build_get_changes",
          "description": "Get the changes associated with a specific build.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "type": "object",
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "properties": {
                "continuationToken": {
                  "description": "Continuation token for pagination",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "top": {
                  "default": 100,
                  "description": "Number of changes to retrieve, defaults to 100",
                  "type": "number"
                },
                "includeSourceChange": {
                  "type": "boolean",
                  "description": "Whether to include source changes in the results, defaults to false"
                },
                "project": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Project ID or name to get the build changes for"
                },
                "buildId": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "ID of the build to get changes for"
                }
              },
              "required": [
                "project",
                "buildId"
              ]
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "work_create_iterations",
          "description": "Create new iterations in a specified Azure DevOps project.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "required": [
                "project",
                "iterations"
              ],
              "type": "object",
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "properties": {
                "iterations": {
                  "description": "An array of iterations to create. Each iteration must have a name and can optionally have start and finish dates in ISO format.",
                  "items": {
                    "required": [
                      "iterationName"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "finishDate": {
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "The finish date of the iteration in ISO format (e.g., '2023-01-31T23:59:59Z'). Optional."
                      },
                      "startDate": {
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "The start date of the iteration in ISO format (e.g., '2023-01-01T00:00:00Z'). Optional."
                      },
                      "iterationName": {
                        "description": "The name of the iteration to create.",
                        "type": "string"
                      }
                    },
                    "additionalProperties": false,
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  "type": "array"
                },
                "project": {
                  "description": "The name or ID of the Azure DevOps project.",
                  "type": "string"
                }
              },
              "additionalProperties": false
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "testplan_create_test_plan",
          "description": "Creates a new test plan in the project.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "required": [
                "project",
                "name",
                "iteration"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "project": {
                  "description": "The unique identifier (ID or name) of the Azure DevOps project where the test plan will be created.",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "name": {
                  "description": "The name of the test plan to be created.",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "description": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The description of the test plan"
                },
                "startDate": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The start date of the test plan"
                },
                "endDate": {
                  "description": "The end date of the test plan",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "areaPath": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The area path for the test plan"
                },
                "iteration": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The iteration path for the test plan"
                }
              },
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "type": "object",
              "additionalProperties": false
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "wit_update_work_items_batch",
          "description": "Update work items in batch",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "properties": {
                "updates": {
                  "items": {
                    "additionalProperties": false,
                    "type": "object",
                    "properties": {
                      "op": {
                        "default": "add",
                        "type": "string",
                        "enum": [
                          "add",
                          "replace",
                          "remove"
                        ],
                        "description": "The operation to perform on the field."
                      },
                      "path": {
                        "description": "The path of the field to update, e.g., '/fields/System.Title'.",
                        "type": "string"
                      },
                      "value": {
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "The new value for the field. This is required for 'add' and 'replace' operations, and should be omitted for 'remove' operations."
                      },
                      "id": {
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "The ID of the work item to update."
                      }
                    },
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "path",
                      "value"
                    ]
                  },
                  "description": "An array of updates to apply to work items. Each update should include the operation (op), work item ID (id), field path (path), and new value (value).",
                  "type": "array"
                }
              },
              "required": [
                "updates"
              ],
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "type": "object"
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "repo_list_repos_by_project",
          "description": "Retrieve a list of repositories for a given project",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "properties": {
                "top": {
                  "description": "The maximum number of repositories to return.",
                  "default": 100,
                  "type": "number"
                },
                "project": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The name or ID of the Azure DevOps project."
                },
                "skip": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "The number of repositories to skip. Defaults to 0.",
                  "default": 0
                },
                "repoNameFilter": {
                  "description": "Optional filter to search for repositories by name. If provided, only repositories with names containing this string will be returned.",
                  "type": "string"
                }
              },
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "type": "object",
              "required": [
                "project"
              ]
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "core_list_project_teams",
          "description": "Retrieve a list of teams for the specified Azure DevOps project.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "type": "object",
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "properties": {
                "mine": {
                  "description": "If true, only return teams that the authenticated user is a member of.",
                  "type": "boolean"
                },
                "project": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The name or ID of the Azure DevOps project."
                },
                "skip": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "The number of teams to skip for pagination. Defaults to 0."
                },
                "top": {
                  "description": "The maximum number of teams to return. Defaults to 100.",
                  "type": "number"
                }
              },
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "required": [
                "project"
              ]
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "build_get_definitions",
          "description": "Retrieves a list of build definitions for a given project.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "required": [
                "project"
              ],
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "properties": {
                "project": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Project ID or name to get build definitions for"
                },
                "top": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "Maximum number of build definitions to return"
                },
                "includeAllProperties": {
                  "type": "boolean",
                  "description": "Whether to include all properties in the results"
                },
                "includeLatestBuilds": {
                  "type": "boolean",
                  "description": "Whether to include the latest builds for each definition"
                },
                "continuationToken": {
                  "description": "Token for continuing paged results",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "minMetricsTime": {
                  "description": "Minimum metrics time to filter build definitions",
                  "type": "string",
                  "format": "date-time"
                },
                "notBuiltAfter": {
                  "description": "Return definitions that do not have builds after this date",
                  "type": "string",
                  "format": "date-time"
                },
                "yamlFilename": {
                  "description": "YAML filename to filter build definitions",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "repositoryId": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Repository ID to filter build definitions"
                },
                "definitionIds": {
                  "type": "array",
                  "items": {
                    "type": "number"
                  },
                  "description": "Array of build definition IDs to filter"
                },
                "queryOrder": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "enum": [
                    0,
                    1,
                    2,
                    3,
                    4
                  ],
                  "description": "Order in which build definitions are returned"
                },
                "name": {
                  "description": "Name of the build definition to filter",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "builtAfter": {
                  "format": "date-time",
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Return definitions that have builds after this date"
                },
                "repositoryType": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Type of repository to filter build definitions",
                  "enum": [
                    "TfsGit",
                    "GitHub",
                    "BitbucketCloud"
                  ]
                },
                "path": {
                  "description": "Path of the build definition to filter",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "taskIdFilter": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Task ID to filter build definitions"
                },
                "processType": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "Process type to filter build definitions"
                }
              },
              "type": "object",
              "additionalProperties": false
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "build_get_definition_revisions",
          "description": "Retrieves a list of revisions for a specific build definition.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "type": "object",
              "required": [
                "project",
                "definitionId"
              ],
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
              "properties": {
                "definitionId": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "ID of the build definition to get revisions for"
                },
                "project": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Project ID or name to get the build definition revisions for"
                }
              },
              "additionalProperties": false
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "testplan_add_test_cases_to_suite",
          "description": "Adds existing test cases to a test suite.",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "properties": {
                "suiteId": {
                  "description": "The ID of the test suite.",
                  "type": "number"
                },
                "project": {
                  "description": "The unique identifier (ID or name) of the Azure DevOps project.",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "testCaseIds": {
                  "description": "The ID(s) of the test case(s) to add. ",
                  "anyOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "array",
                      "items": {
                        "type": "string"
                      }
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "planId": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "description": "The ID of the test plan."
                }
              },
              "type": "object",
              "required": [
                "project",
                "planId",
                "suiteId",
                "testCaseIds"
              ],
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"
            }
          }
        }
      }
    ],
    "awslabs.cost-explorer-mcp-server": [
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "get_today_date",
          "description": "[DEPRECATED] Retrieve current date information in UTC time zone.\n\n    This tool retrieves the current date in YYYY-MM-DD format and the current month in YYYY-MM format.\n    It's useful for calculating relevant dates when a user asks about the last N months/days.\n\n    Args:\n        ctx: MCP context\n\n    Returns:\n        Dictionary containing today's date and current month\n    ",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "properties": {},
              "title": "get_today_dateArguments",
              "type": "object"
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "get_dimension_values",
          "description": "[DEPRECATED] Retrieve available dimension values for AWS Cost Explorer.\n\n    This tool retrieves all available and valid values for a specified dimension (e.g., SERVICE, REGION)\n    over a period of time. This is useful for validating filter values or exploring available options\n    for cost analysis.\n\n    Args:\n        ctx: MCP context\n        date_range: The billing period start and end dates in YYYY-MM-DD format\n        dimension: The dimension key to retrieve values for (e.g., SERVICE, REGION, LINKED_ACCOUNT)\n\n    Returns:\n        Dictionary containing the dimension name and list of available values\n    ",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "$defs": {
                "DimensionKey": {
                  "required": [
                    "dimension_key"
                  ],
                  "title": "DimensionKey",
                  "type": "object",
                  "description": "Dimension key model.",
                  "properties": {
                    "dimension_key": {
                      "description": "The name of the dimension to retrieve values for. Valid values are AZ, BILLING_ENTITY, CACHE_ENGINE, DEPLOYMENT_OPTION, DATABASE_ENGINE, INSTANCE_TYPE, INSTANCE_TYPE_FAMILY, INVOICING_ENTITY, LEGAL_ENTITY_NAME, LINKED_ACCOUNT, OPERATING_SYSTEM, OPERATION, PLATFORM, PURCHASE_TYPE, RESERVATION_ID, SAVINGS_PLAN_ARN, SAVINGS_PLANS_TYPE, SERVICE, TENANCY, USAGE_TYPE, USAGE_TYPE_GROUP, REGION, RECORD_TYPE.",
                      "title": "Dimension Key",
                      "type": "string"
                    }
                  }
                },
                "DateRange": {
                  "title": "DateRange",
                  "properties": {
                    "end_date": {
                      "title": "End Date",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "The end date of the billing period in YYYY-MM-DD format."
                    },
                    "start_date": {
                      "title": "Start Date",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "The start date of the billing period in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to last month, if not provided."
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object",
                  "description": "Date range model for cost queries.",
                  "required": [
                    "start_date",
                    "end_date"
                  ]
                }
              },
              "required": [
                "date_range",
                "dimension"
              ],
              "title": "get_dimension_valuesArguments",
              "type": "object",
              "properties": {
                "dimension": {
                  "$ref": "#/$defs/DimensionKey"
                },
                "date_range": {
                  "$ref": "#/$defs/DateRange"
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "get_cost_forecast",
          "description": "[DEPRECATED] Retrieve AWS cost forecasts based on historical usage patterns.\n\n    This tool generates cost forecasts for future periods using AWS Cost Explorer's machine learning models.\n    Forecasts are based on your historical usage patterns and can help with budget planning and cost optimization.\n\n    Important granularity limits:\n    - DAILY forecasts: Maximum 3 months into the future\n    - MONTHLY forecasts: Maximum 12 months into the future\n\n    Note: The forecast start date must be equal to or no later than the current date, while the end date\n    must be in the future. AWS automatically uses available historical data to generate forecasts.\n    Forecasts return total costs and cannot be grouped by dimensions like services or regions.\n\n    Example: Get monthly cost forecast for EC2 services for next quarter\n        await get_cost_forecast(\n            ctx=context,\n            date_range={\n                \"start_date\": \"2025-06-19\",  # Today or earlier\n                \"end_date\": \"2025-09-30\"     # Future date\n            },\n            granularity=\"MONTHLY\",\n            filter_expression={\n                \"Dimensions\": {\n                    \"Key\": \"SERVICE\",\n                    \"Values\": [\"Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud - Compute\"],\n                    \"MatchOptions\": [\"EQUALS\"]\n                }\n            },\n            metric=\"UNBLENDED_COST\",\n            prediction_interval_level=80\n        )\n\n    Args:\n        ctx: MCP context\n        date_range: The forecast period dates in YYYY-MM-DD format (start_date <= today, end_date > today)\n        granularity: The granularity at which forecast data is aggregated (DAILY, MONTHLY)\n        filter_expression: Filter criteria as a Python dictionary\n        metric: Cost metric to forecast (UNBLENDED_COST, AMORTIZED_COST, etc.)\n        prediction_interval_level: Confidence level for prediction intervals (80 or 95)\n\n    Returns:\n        Dictionary containing forecast data with confidence intervals and metadata\n    ",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "title": "get_cost_forecastArguments",
              "properties": {
                "metric": {
                  "title": "Metric",
                  "default": "UNBLENDED_COST",
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "The metric to forecast. Valid values are AMORTIZED_COST,BLENDED_COST,NET_AMORTIZED_COST,NET_UNBLENDED_COST,UNBLENDED_COST. Note: UsageQuantity forecasting is not supported by AWS Cost Explorer."
                },
                "filter_expression": {
                  "anyOf": [
                    {
                      "additionalProperties": true,
                      "type": "object"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ],
                  "description": "Filter criteria as a Python dictionary to narrow down AWS cost forecasts. Supports filtering by Dimensions (SERVICE, REGION, etc.), Tags, or CostCategories. You can use logical operators (And, Or, Not) for complex filters. Same format as get_cost_and_usage filter_expression.",
                  "title": "Filter Expression",
                  "default": null
                },
                "prediction_interval_level": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "default": 80,
                  "title": "Prediction Interval Level",
                  "description": "The confidence level for the forecast prediction interval. Valid values are 80 and 95. Higher values provide wider confidence ranges."
                },
                "date_range": {
                  "$ref": "#/$defs/DateRange"
                },
                "granularity": {
                  "description": "The granularity at which forecast data is aggregated. Valid values are DAILY and MONTHLY. DAILY forecasts support up to 3 months, MONTHLY forecasts support up to 12 months. If not provided, defaults to MONTHLY.",
                  "type": "string",
                  "default": "MONTHLY",
                  "title": "Granularity"
                }
              },
              "type": "object",
              "$defs": {
                "DateRange": {
                  "required": [
                    "start_date",
                    "end_date"
                  ],
                  "title": "DateRange",
                  "type": "object",
                  "properties": {
                    "end_date": {
                      "description": "The end date of the billing period in YYYY-MM-DD format.",
                      "title": "End Date",
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    "start_date": {
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "The start date of the billing period in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to last month, if not provided.",
                      "title": "Start Date"
                    }
                  },
                  "description": "Date range model for cost queries."
                }
              },
              "required": [
                "date_range"
              ]
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "get_cost_and_usage_comparisons",
          "description": "[DEPRECATED] Compare AWS costs and usage between two time periods.\n\n    This tool compares cost and usage data between a baseline period and a comparison period,\n    providing percentage changes and absolute differences. Both periods must be exactly one month\n    and start/end on the first day of a month. The tool also provides detailed cost drivers\n    when available, showing what specific factors contributed to cost changes.\n\n    Important requirements:\n    - Both periods must be exactly one month duration\n    - Dates must start and end on the first day of a month (e.g., 2025-01-01 to 2025-02-01)\n    - Maximum lookback of 13 months (38 months if multi-year data enabled)\n    - Start dates must be equal to or no later than current date\n\n    Example: Compare January 2025 vs December 2024 EC2 costs\n        await get_cost_and_usage_comparisons(\n            ctx=context,\n            baseline_date_range={\n                \"start_date\": \"2024-12-01\",  # December 2024\n                \"end_date\": \"2025-01-01\"\n            },\n            comparison_date_range={\n                \"start_date\": \"2025-01-01\",  # January 2025\n                \"end_date\": \"2025-02-01\"\n            },\n            metric_for_comparison=\"UnblendedCost\",\n            group_by={\"Type\": \"DIMENSION\", \"Key\": \"SERVICE\"},\n            filter_expression={\n                \"Dimensions\": {\n                    \"Key\": \"SERVICE\",\n                    \"Values\": [\"Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud - Compute\"],\n                    \"MatchOptions\": [\"EQUALS\"]\n                }\n            }\n        )\n\n    Args:\n        ctx: MCP context\n        baseline_date_range: The reference period for comparison (exactly one month)\n        comparison_date_range: The comparison period (exactly one month)\n        metric_for_comparison: Cost metric to compare (UnblendedCost, BlendedCost, etc.)\n        group_by: Either a dictionary with Type and Key, or simply a string key to group by\n        filter_expression: Filter criteria as a Python dictionary\n\n    Returns:\n        Dictionary containing comparison data with percentage changes, absolute differences,\n        and detailed cost drivers when available\n    ",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "required": [
                "baseline_date_range",
                "comparison_date_range"
              ],
              "type": "object",
              "title": "get_cost_and_usage_comparisonsArguments",
              "$defs": {
                "DateRange": {
                  "properties": {
                    "start_date": {
                      "description": "The start date of the billing period in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to last month, if not provided.",
                      "type": "string",
                      "title": "Start Date"
                    },
                    "end_date": {
                      "title": "End Date",
                      "description": "The end date of the billing period in YYYY-MM-DD format.",
                      "type": "string"
                    }
                  },
                  "description": "Date range model for cost queries.",
                  "required": [
                    "start_date",
                    "end_date"
                  ],
                  "title": "DateRange",
                  "type": "object"
                }
              },
              "properties": {
                "group_by": {
                  "title": "Group By",
                  "anyOf": [
                    {
                      "additionalProperties": {
                        "type": "string"
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ],
                  "description": "Either a dictionary with Type and Key for grouping comparisons, or simply a string key to group by (which will default to DIMENSION type). Example dictionary: {'Type': 'DIMENSION', 'Key': 'SERVICE'}. Example string: 'SERVICE'.",
                  "default": "SERVICE"
                },
                "baseline_date_range": {
                  "$ref": "#/$defs/DateRange"
                },
                "metric_for_comparison": {
                  "description": "The cost and usage metric to compare. Valid values are AmortizedCost, BlendedCost, NetAmortizedCost, NetUnblendedCost, UnblendedCost, UsageQuantity.",
                  "title": "Metric For Comparison",
                  "type": "string",
                  "default": "UnblendedCost"
                },
                "filter_expression": {
                  "anyOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "object",
                      "additionalProperties": true
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ],
                  "default": null,
                  "description": "Filter criteria as a Python dictionary to narrow down AWS cost comparisons. Supports filtering by Dimensions (SERVICE, REGION, etc.), Tags, or CostCategories. You can use logical operators (And, Or, Not) for complex filters. Same format as get_cost_and_usage filter_expression.",
                  "title": "Filter Expression"
                },
                "comparison_date_range": {
                  "$ref": "#/$defs/DateRange"
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "get_tag_values",
          "description": "[DEPRECATED] Retrieve available tag values for AWS Cost Explorer.\n\n    This tool retrieves all available values for a specified tag key over a period of time.\n    This is useful for validating tag filter values or exploring available tag options for cost analysis.\n\n    Args:\n        ctx: MCP context\n        date_range: The billing period start and end dates in YYYY-MM-DD format\n        tag_key: The tag key to retrieve values for\n\n    Returns:\n        Dictionary containing the tag key and list of available values\n    ",
          "input_schema": {
            "json": {
              "properties": {
                "tag_key": {
                  "description": "The tag key to retrieve values for",
                  "title": "Tag Key",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "date_range": {
                  "$ref": "#/$defs/DateRange"
                }
              },
              "required": [
                "date_range",
                "tag_key"
              ],
              "title": "get_tag_valuesArguments",
              "$defs": {
                "DateRange": {
                  "description": "Date range model for cost queries.",
                  "required": [
                    "start_date",
                    "end_date"
                  ],
                  "title": "DateRange",
                  "properties": {
                    "end_date": {
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "The end date of the billing period in YYYY-MM-DD format.",
                      "title": "End Date"
                    },
                    "start_date": {
                      "title": "Start Date",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "The start date of the billing period in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to last month, if not provided."
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "ToolSpecification": {
          "name": "get_cost_comparison_drivers",
          "description": "[DEPRECATED] Analyze what drove cost changes between two time periods.\n\n    This tool provides detailed analysis of the TOP 10 most significant cost drivers\n    that caused changes between periods. AWS returns only the most impactful drivers\n    to focus on the changes that matter most for cost optimization.\n\n    The tool provides rich insights including:\n    - Top 10 most significant cost drivers across all services (or filtered subset)\n    - Specific usage types that drove changes (e.g., \"BoxUsage:c5.large\", \"NatGateway-Hours\")\n    - Multiple driver types: usage changes, savings plan impacts, enterprise discounts, support fees\n    - Both cost and usage quantity changes with units (hours, GB-months, etc.)\n    - Context about what infrastructure components changed\n    - Detailed breakdown of usage patterns vs pricing changes\n\n    Can be used with or without filters:\n    - Without filters: Shows top 10 cost drivers across ALL services\n    - With filters: Shows top 10 cost drivers within the filtered scope\n    - Multiple services: Can filter to multiple services and get top 10 within that scope\n\n    Both periods must be exactly one month and start/end on the first day of a month.\n\n    Important requirements:\n    - Both periods must be exactly one month duration\n    - Dates must start and end on the first day of a month (e.g., 2025-01-01 to 2025-02-01)\n    - Maximum lookback of 13 months (38 months if multi-year data enabled)\n    -
